I've uploaded a code repository in the directory . Consider the following PR description:

<pr_description>
Supports PostgreSQL's `citext` type in function
### What problem are you trying to solve?

I have a minimal reproduction repo for this problem: [ChrisTorng/PostgreSqlCitext/BeforeFix](https://github.com/ChrisTorng/PostgreSqlCitext/tree/main/BeforeFix).

---

I'm using 4/6/2026 2.6.1465 version of [EF Core Power Tools](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=ErikEJ.EFCorePowerTools) to do Reverse Engineering.

There are four problems I'm facing:

1. For function with `citext` parameter, EFCPT can't generate codes.
2. For function with `citext` return value, EFCPT can't generate codes, with different error.
3. The generation stops without other normal ones generated, and not showing which item causes the problem.
4. The renaming of function returned table column doesn't work on Edit UI or on `efpt.renaming.json`.

This Feature Request focuses on problem 1/2/3.

### Problem 1: `citext` parameter in function

For a simple [`sql/testcitextin.sql`](https://github.com/ChrisTorng/PostgreSqlCitext/blob/master/sql/testcitextin.sql), using original EF Core Power Tools to refresh [`BeforeFix/efpt.testcitextin.config.json`](https://github.com/ChrisTorng/PostgreSqlCitext/blob/master/BeforeFix/efpt.testcitextin.config.json), it ends up this error message:

### Problem 3: Generate stops without showing which item causes the problem

For both cases, the generate stops, without anything like [`sql/testtext.sql`](https://github.com/ChrisTorng/PostgreSqlCitext/blob/master/sql/testtext.sql) related generated. You can check [`BeforeFix/TestCitextInModels/`](https://github.com/ChrisTorng/PostgreSqlCitext/blob/master/BeforeFix/TestCitextInModels/) and [`BeforeFix/TestCitextOutModels/`](https://github.com/ChrisTorng/PostgreSqlCitext/blob/master/BeforeFix/TestCitextOutModels/) folders for generated codes.

For [`sql/testcitextin.sql`](https://github.com/ChrisTorng/PostgreSqlCitext/blob/master/sql/testcitextin.sql) one, the error message doesn't shows which item causes this problem, makes it hard to find out the problematic item while there are lots of items.

But for [`sql/\testtext.sql`](https://github.com/ChrisTorng/PostgreSqlCitext/blob/master/sql/testtext.sql) with [`BeforeFix/efpt.testtext.config.json`](https://github.com/ChrisTorng/PostgreSqlCitext/blob/master/BeforeFix/efpt.testtext.config.json), it generates codes in [`BeforeFix/TestTextModels/`](https://github.com/ChrisTorng/PostgreSqlCitext/blob/master/BeforeFix/TestTextModels/) successfully.

### Describe the solution you'd like

## The Fixes

I've forked [ErikEJ/EFCorePowerTools](https://github.com/ErikEJ/EFCorePowerTools) from [chore: move sln to slnx (#3343)](https://github.com/ErikEJ/EFCorePowerTools/commit/cfb4c2f99616d8e2886440d35555fa1b4c842457) into my repo [ChrisTorng/EFCorePowerTools](https://github.com/ChrisTorng/EFCorePowerTools). With the help of GitHub Copilot, I made some changes to make it works on my Visual Studio 2026 Insiders, easier to debug (cause I can't found other easier ways). And the fixes are these:

1. Problem 1/2 (`citext` in/out): [Fix citext in/out parameter code gen](https://github.com/ChrisTorng/EFCorePowerTools/commit/96a3ec6407b33766da612f1acba6aee945e8c5bf) and [Fix citext in/out parameter code genenation](https://github.com/ChrisTorng/EFCorePowerTools/commit/fde5123aa40cbf9a6144306502e725439da85015).
2. Problem 3 (generation stops without which): [Always generate code by pre-check, print error message and remove problematic items](https://github.com/ChrisTorng/EFCorePowerTools/commit/2ba803314e3b0adca9e5217777a1feec8ae1adda).

### The Results

The fixed version of EFCPT, Refreshing the [`AfterFix/efpt.config.json`](https://github.com/ChrisTorng/PostgreSqlCitext/blob/master/AfterFix/efpt.config.json), has one error message left:
```
Unable to scaffold "dbo"."testrefcursor": parameter 'p_refcur' has unsupported store type 'refcursor'. storetype: refcursor, objectName: p_refcur (Parameter 'storeType')
```

It clearly indicates the problematic item, without blocking others. (We are not willing to use `refcursor`, so it's not a blocking problem for us.)

And all other codes generated successfully, under [`AfterFix/Models/`](https://github.com/ChrisTorng/PostgreSqlCitext/blob/master/AfterFix/Models/) folders. Mainly in [`AfterFix/Models/TestTextResult.cs`](https://github.com/ChrisTorng/PostgreSqlCitext/blob/master/AfterFix/Models/PGContextFunctions.cs) with `testcitextinAsync()`/`testcitextoutAsync()`/`TestTextAsync()` generated.

## No PR for original repo

Sorry it's hard for me to contribute a PR to the original repo, because of:

1. These changes are made by GitHub Copilot mainly. I can understand some easier ones. But I can't fully understand the whole picture of EFCPT.
2. I didn't drill down into how to unit test these changes, by EFCPT's own way.
3. I've changed many other files for local running/debugging. I believe these are not what you want.
4. I'm not familiar of how GitHub/PR works.

Hope these fixes helps EFCPT to support PostgreSQL `citext` type, and easier to diagnose problems.

2026-05-29 13:13:52,154 - ERROR - swea-env-ErikEJ__EFCorePowerTools-3418 - Command '_state_anthropic' failed (r.exit_code=127): Command failed
2026-05-29 13:13:52,163 - DEBUG - swea-tools-ErikEJ__EFCorePowerTools-3418 - Retrieved state from environment: {}
2026-05-29 13:13:52,165 - INFO - swea-agent-ErikEJ__EFCorePowerTools-3418 - 🤖 MODEL INPUT
OBSERVATION:

     1	using System;
     2	using System.Collections.Generic;
     3	using System.Collections.ObjectModel;
     4	using System.Linq;
     5	using NpgsqlTypes;
     6	using RevEng.Core.Abstractions.Metadata;
     7	
     8	namespace RevEng.Core.Routines.Extensions
     9	{
    10	    public static class PostgresNpgsqlTypeExtensions
    11	    {
    12	        private static readonly HashSet<NpgsqlDbType> ScaleTypes =
    13	        [
    14	            NpgsqlDbType.Numeric,
    15	            NpgsqlDbType.Money,
    16	        ];
    17	
    18	        private static readonly HashSet<NpgsqlDbType> VarTimeTypes =
    19	        [
    20	            NpgsqlDbType.TimestampTz,
    21	            NpgsqlDbType.Timestamp,
    22	            NpgsqlDbType.Time,
    23	        ];
    24	
    25	        private static readonly HashSet<NpgsqlDbType> LengthRequiredTypes =
    26	        [
    27	            NpgsqlDbType.Varchar,
    28	            NpgsqlDbType.Char,
    29	        ];
    30	
    31	        private static readonly ReadOnlyDictionary<string, string> SqlTypeAliases
    32	        = new ReadOnlyDictionary<string, string>(
    33	            new Dictionary<string, string>()
    34	            {
    35	                { "bool", "boolean" },
    36	                { "decimal", "numeric" },
    37	                { "double precision", "double" },
    38	                { "float8", "double" },
    39	                { "character varying", "varchar" },
    40	                { "character", "char" },
    41	                { "float4", "real" },
    42	                { "int", "integer" },
    43	                { "int4", "integer" },
    44	                { "timestamp with time zone", "timestamptz" },
    45	                { "time with time zone", "timetz" },
    46	                { "timestamp without time zone", "timestamp" },
    47	                { "time without time zone", "time" },
    48	
    49	                ////{ "character varying[]", "text[]" },
    50	                ////{ "character[]", "char[]" },
    51	                ////{ "timestamp with time zone[]", "timestamp[]" },
    52	                ////{ "timestamp without time zone[]", "timestamp[]" },
    53	                ////{ "time with time zone[]", "time[]" },
    54	                ////{ "time without time zone[]", "time[]" },
    55	                ////{ "double precision[]", "float8[]" },
    56	                ////{ "real[]", "float4[]" },
    57	                ////{ "integer[]", "int[]" },
    58	                ////{ "boolean[]", "bool[]" },
    59	            });
    60	
    61	        public static bool UseDateOnlyTimeOnly { get; set; }
    62	
    63	        public static bool IsScaleType(this NpgsqlDbType dbType)
    64	        {
    65	            return ScaleTypes.Contains(dbType);
    66	        }
    67	
    68	        public static bool IsVarTimeType(this NpgsqlDbType dbType)
    69	        {
    70	            return VarTimeTypes.Contains(dbType);
    71	        }
    72	
    73	        public static bool IsLengthRequiredType(this NpgsqlDbType dbType)
    74	        {
    75	            return LengthRequiredTypes.Contains(dbType);
    76	        }
    77	
    78	        public static Type ClrTypeFromNpgsqlParameter(this ModuleParameter storedProcedureParameter, bool asMethodParameter = false)
    79	        {
    80	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(storedProcedureParameter);
    81	
    82	            return GetClrType(storedProcedureParameter.StoreType, storedProcedureParameter.Nullable, storedProcedureParameter.Name, asMethodParameter);
    83	        }
    84	
    85	        public static NpgsqlDbType GetNpgsqlDbType(this ModuleParameter storedProcedureParameter)
    86	        {
    87	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(storedProcedureParameter);
    88	
    89	            return GetNpgsqlDbType(storedProcedureParameter.StoreType);
    90	        }
    91	
    92	        public static Type GetClrType(this ModuleResultElement moduleResultElement)
    93	        {
    94	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(moduleResultElement);
    95	
    96	            return GetClrType(moduleResultElement.StoreType, moduleResultElement.Nullable, moduleResultElement.Name);
    97	        }
    98	
    99	        public static Type GetClrType(string storeType, bool isNullable, string objectName, bool asParameter = false)
   100	        {
   101	            var sqlType = GetNpgsqlDbType(storeType);
   102	
   103	            var useDateOnlyTimeOnly = UseDateOnlyTimeOnly;
   104	
   105	            switch (sqlType)
   106	            {
   107	                case NpgsqlDbType.Bigint:
   108	                    return isNullable ? typeof(long?) : typeof(long);
   109	
   110	                case NpgsqlDbType.Bytea:
   111	                    return typeof(byte[]);
   112	
   113	                case NpgsqlDbType.Boolean:
   114	                    return isNullable ? typeof(bool?) : typeof(bool);
   115	
   116	                case NpgsqlDbType.Char:
   117	                case NpgsqlDbType.Text:
   118	                case NpgsqlDbType.Varchar:
   119	                case NpgsqlDbType.Json:
   120	                case NpgsqlDbType.Jsonb:
   121	                case NpgsqlDbType.Xml:
   122	                case NpgsqlDbType.TsQuery:
   123	                    return typeof(string);
   124	
   125	                case NpgsqlDbType.Date:
   126	                    if (useDateOnlyTimeOnly)
   127	                    {
   128	                        return isNullable ? typeof(DateOnly?) : typeof(DateOnly);
   129	                    }
   130	
   131	                    return isNullable ? typeof(DateTime?) : typeof(DateTime);
   132	
   133	                case NpgsqlDbType.Double:
   134	                    return isNullable ? typeof(double?) : typeof(double);
   135	
   136	                case NpgsqlDbType.Integer:
   137	                    return isNullable ? typeof(int?) : typeof(int);
   138	
   139	                case NpgsqlDbType.Numeric:
   140	                case NpgsqlDbType.Money:
   141	                    return isNullable ? typeof(decimal?) : typeof(decimal);
   142	
   143	                case NpgsqlDbType.Real:
   144	                    return isNullable ? typeof(float?) : typeof(float);
   145	
   146	                case NpgsqlDbType.Smallint:
   147	                    return isNullable ? typeof(short?) : typeof(short);
   148	
   149	                case NpgsqlDbType.Time:
   150	                    if (useDateOnlyTimeOnly)
   151	                    {
   152	                        return isNullable ? typeof(TimeOnly?) : typeof(TimeOnly);
   153	                    }
   154	
   155	                    return isNullable ? typeof(TimeSpan?) : typeof(TimeSpan);
   156	
   157	                case NpgsqlDbType.TimestampTz:
   158	                case NpgsqlDbType.Timestamp:
   159	                    return isNullable ? typeof(DateTime?) : typeof(DateTime);
   160	
   161	                case NpgsqlDbType.Uuid:
   162	                    return isNullable ? typeof(Guid?) : typeof(Guid);
   163	
   164	                default:
   165	                    throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(storeType), $"storetype: {storeType}, objectName: {objectName}");
   166	            }
   167	        }
   168	
   169	        private static NpgsqlDbType GetNpgsqlDbType(string storeType)
   170	        {
   171	            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(storeType))
   172	            {
   173	                throw new ArgumentException("storeType not specified");
   174	            }
   175	
   176	            var cleanedTypeName = RemoveMatchingBraces(storeType);
   177	
   178	            if (cleanedTypeName == null)
   179	            {
   180	                throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(storeType), $"Unable to remove braces: {storeType}");
   181	            }
   182	
   183	#pragma warning disable CA1308 // Normalize strings to uppercase
   184	            if (SqlTypeAliases.TryGetValue(cleanedTypeName.ToLowerInvariant(), out var alias))
   185	            {
   186	                cleanedTypeName = alias;
   187	            }
   188	#pragma warning restore CA1308 // Normalize strings to uppercase
   189	
   190	            if (!Enum.TryParse(cleanedTypeName, true, out NpgsqlDbType result))
   191	            {
   192	                throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(storeType), $"cleanedTypeName: {cleanedTypeName}");
   193	            }
   194	
   195	            return result;
   196	        }
   197	
   198	        private static string RemoveMatchingBraces(string s)
   199	        {
   200	            var stack = new Stack<char>();
   201	            var count = 0;
   202	            foreach (var ch in s)
   203	            {
   204	                switch (ch)
   205	                {
   206	                    case '(':
   207	                        count += 1;
   208	                        stack.Push(ch);
   209	                        break;
   210	                    case ')':
   211	                        if (count == 0)
   212	                        {
   213	                            stack.Push(ch);
   214	                        }
   215	                        else
   216	                        {
   217	                            char popped;
   218	                            do
   219	                            {
   220	                                popped = stack.Pop();
   221	                            }
   222	                            while (popped != '(');
   223	                            count -= 1;
   224	                        }
   225	
   226	                        break;
   227	                    default:
   228	                        stack.Push(ch);
   229	                        break;
   230	                }
   231	            }
   232	
   233	            return string.Join(string.Empty, stack.Reverse());
   234	        }
   235	    }
   236	}

     1	using System;
     2	using System.Collections.Generic;
     3	using System.IO;
     4	using System.Linq;
     5	using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Design;
     6	using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Infrastructure;
     7	using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Scaffolding;
     8	using NetTopologySuite.Geometries;
     9	using RevEng.Common;
    10	using RevEng.Core.Abstractions;
    11	using RevEng.Core.Abstractions.Metadata;
    12	using RevEng.Core.Routines.Extensions;

    14	namespace RevEng.Core.Routines.Procedures
    15	{
    16	    public abstract class ProcedureScaffolder : IRoutineScaffolder
    17	    {
    18	#pragma warning disable SA1401 // Fields should be private
    19	        internal readonly ICSharpHelper Code;
    20	        internal IndentedStringBuilder Sb;
    21	#pragma warning restore SA1401 // Fields should be private
    22	        private readonly IClrTypeMapper typeMapper;
    23	        private readonly Scaffolder scaffolder;
    24	
    25	        protected ProcedureScaffolder([System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNull] ICSharpHelper code, IClrTypeMapper typeMapper)
    26	        {
    27	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(code);
    28	            Code = code;
    29	            this.typeMapper = typeMapper;
    30	            scaffolder = new Scaffolder(code, typeMapper);
    31	        }
    32	
    33	        public string FileNameSuffix { get; set; }
    34	
    35	        public string ProviderUsing { get; set; }
    36	
    37	        public SavedModelFiles Save(ScaffoldedModel scaffoldedModel, string outputDir, string nameSpaceValue, bool useAsyncCalls, bool useInternalAccessModifier, bool useNullableReferences)
    38	        {
    39	            return ScaffoldHelper.Save(scaffoldedModel, outputDir, nameSpaceValue, useAsyncCalls);
    40	        }
    41	
    42	        public ScaffoldedModel ScaffoldModel(RoutineModel model, ModuleScaffolderOptions scaffolderOptions, List<string> schemas, ref List<string> errors)
    43	        {
    44	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(model);
    45	
    46	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(errors);
    47	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(scaffolderOptions);
    48	
    49	            var result = new ScaffoldedModel();
    50	            var path = string.Empty;
    51	
    52	            errors.AddRange(model.Errors);
    53	
    54	            schemas = schemas ?? new List<string>();
    55	
    56	            foreach (var routine in model.Routines.Where(r => string.IsNullOrEmpty(r.MappedType) && (!(r is Function f) || !f.IsScalar)))
    57	            {
    58	                var i = 1;
    59	
    60	                foreach (var resultSet in routine.Results)
    61	                {
    62	                    if (routine.NoResultSet)
    63	                    {
    64	                        continue;
    65	                    }
    66	
    67	                    var suffix = string.Empty;
    68	                    if (routine.Results.Count > 1)
    69	                    {
    70	                        suffix = $"{i++}";
    71	                    }
    72	
    73	                    var typeName = ScaffoldHelper.GenerateIdentifierName(routine, model, Code, scaffolderOptions.UsePascalIdentifiers) + "Result" + suffix;
    74	
    75	                    var classContent = scaffolder.WriteResultClass(resultSet, scaffolderOptions, typeName, routine.Schema);
    76	
    77	                    if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(routine.Schema))
    78	                    {
    79	                        schemas.Add($"{routine.Schema}Schema");
    80	                    }
    81	
    82	                    path = scaffolderOptions.UseSchemaFolders
    83	                                ? Path.Combine(routine.Schema, $"{typeName}.cs")
    84	                                : $"{typeName}.cs";
    85	#if CORE90 || CORE100
    86	                    result.AdditionalFiles.Add(new ScaffoldedFile(path, classContent));
    87	#else
    88	                    result.AdditionalFiles.Add(new ScaffoldedFile
    89	                    {
    90	                        Code = classContent,
    91	                        Path = path,
    92	                    });
    93	#endif
    94	                }
    95	
    96	                if (!scaffolderOptions.UseTypedTvpParameters)
    97	                {
    98	                    continue;
    99	                }
   100	
   101	                var tvpParameters = routine.Parameters.Where(p => p.TvpColumns?.Count > 0).Select(p => p).ToList();
   102	
   103	                foreach (var tvpParameter in tvpParameters)
   104	                {
   105	                    if (tvpParameter.TvpColumns?.Count > 0)
   106	                    {
   107	                        var typeName = Code.Identifier(ScaffoldHelper.CreateIdentifier(tvpParameter.TypeName).Item1, capitalize: true);
   108	
   109	                        var classContent = scaffolder.WriteResultClass(tvpParameter.TvpColumns, scaffolderOptions, typeName, routine.Schema);
   110	
   111	                        path = $"{typeName}.cs";
   112	
   113	                        if (!result.AdditionalFiles.Any(f => f.Path.Equals(path, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)))
   114	                        {
   115	    #if CORE90 || CORE100
   116	                            result.AdditionalFiles.Add(new ScaffoldedFile(path, classContent));
   117	    #else
   118	                            result.AdditionalFiles.Add(new ScaffoldedFile
   119	                            {
   120	                                Code = classContent,
   121	                                Path = path,
   122	                            });
   123	    #endif
   124	                        }
   125	                    }
   126	                }
   127	            }
   128	
   129	            var dbContextInterface = WriteDbContextInterface(scaffolderOptions, model, schemas.Distinct().ToList());
   130	
   131	            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(dbContextInterface))
   132	            {
   133	                path = Path.GetFullPath(Path.Combine(scaffolderOptions.ContextDir, $"I{scaffolderOptions.ContextName}{FileNameSuffix}.cs"));
   134	#if CORE90 || CORE100
   135	                result.AdditionalFiles.Add(new ScaffoldedFile(path, dbContextInterface));
   136	#else
   137	                result.AdditionalFiles.Add(new ScaffoldedFile
   138	                {
   139	                    Code = dbContextInterface,
   140	                    Path = path,
   141	                });
   142	#endif
   143	            }
   144	
   145	            var dbContext = WriteDbContext(scaffolderOptions, model, schemas.Distinct().ToList());
   146	
   147	            path = Path.GetFullPath(Path.Combine(scaffolderOptions.ContextDir, scaffolderOptions.ContextName + $"{FileNameSuffix}.cs"));
   148	#if CORE90 || CORE100
   149	            result.ContextFile = new ScaffoldedFile(path, dbContext);
   150	#else
   151	            result.ContextFile = new ScaffoldedFile
   152	            {
   153	                Code = dbContext,
   154	                Path = path,
   155	            };
   156	#endif
   157	            return result;
   158	        }
   159	
   160	        protected abstract void GenerateProcedure(Routine procedure, RoutineModel model, bool signatureOnly, bool useAsyncCalls, bool usePascalCase, bool useNullableReferences, bool useTypedTvpParameters);
   161	
   162	        private List<string> CreateUsings(ModuleScaffolderOptions scaffolderOptions, RoutineModel model, List<string> schemas)
   163	        {
   164	            var usings = new List<string>()
   165	            {
   166	                "using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore",
   167	                "using System",
   168	                "using System.Collections.Generic",
   169	                "using System.Data",
   170	                "using System.Threading",
   171	                "using System.Threading.Tasks",
   172	                $"using {scaffolderOptions.ModelNamespace}",
   173	            };
   174	
   175	            usings.Add(ProviderUsing);
   176	
   177	            if (scaffolderOptions.UseSchemaNamespaces)
   178	            {
   179	                schemas.Distinct().OrderBy(s => s).ToList().ForEach(schema => usings.Add($"using {scaffolderOptions.ModelNamespace}.{schema}"));
   180	            }
   181	
   182	            if (model.Routines.Exists(r => r.SupportsMultipleResultSet))
   183	            {
   184	                usings.AddRange(new List<string>()
   185	                {
   186	                    "using Dapper",
   187	                    "using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Storage",
   188	                    "using System.Linq",
   189	                });
   190	            }
   191	            else if (scaffolderOptions.UseTypedTvpParameters && model.Routines.Any(r => r.Parameters.Any(p => p.TvpColumns?.Count > 0)))
   192	            {
   193	                // Need System.Linq for extension methods when TVP is used
   194	                usings.Add("using System.Linq");
   195	            }
   196	
   197	            if (model.Routines.SelectMany(r => r.Parameters).Any(p => typeMapper.GetClrType(p) == typeof(Geometry)))
   198	            {
   199	                usings.AddRange(new List<string>()
   200	                {
   201	                    "using NetTopologySuite.Geometries",
   202	                });
   203	            }
   204	
   205	            if (scaffolderOptions.UseTypedTvpParameters && model.Routines.Any(r => r.Parameters.Any(p => p.TvpColumns?.Count > 0)))
   206	            {
   207	                usings.Add("using System.Reflection");
   208	            }
   209	
   210	            usings.Sort();
   211	            return usings;
   212	        }
   213	
   214	        private string WriteDbContextInterface(ModuleScaffolderOptions scaffolderOptions, RoutineModel model, List<string> schemas)
   215	        {
   216	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(scaffolderOptions);
   217	
   218	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(model);
   219	            string accessModifier = scaffolderOptions.UseInternalAccessModifier ? "internal" : "public";
   220	
   221	            Sb = new IndentedStringBuilder();
   222	
   223	            Sb.AppendLine(PathHelper.Header);
   224	            Sb.AppendLine(scaffolderOptions.NullableReferences ? "#nullable enable" : "#nullable disable");
   225	
   226	            var usings = CreateUsings(scaffolderOptions, model, schemas);
   227	
   228	            foreach (var statement in usings)
   229	            {
   230	                Sb.AppendLine($"{statement};");
   231	            }
   232	
   233	            Sb.AppendLine();
   234	            Sb.AppendLine($"namespace {scaffolderOptions.ContextNamespace}");
   235	            Sb.AppendLine("{");
   236	
   237	            using (Sb.Indent())
   238	            {
   239	                Sb.AppendLine($"{accessModifier} partial interface I{scaffolderOptions.ContextName}{FileNameSuffix}");
   240	                Sb.AppendLine("{");
   241	                using (Sb.Indent())
   242	                {
   243	                    foreach (var procedure in model.Routines)
   244	                    {
   245	                        GenerateProcedure(procedure, model, true, scaffolderOptions.UseAsyncCalls, scaffolderOptions.UsePascalIdentifiers, scaffolderOptions.NullableReferences, scaffolderOptions.UseTypedTvpParameters);
   246	                        Sb.AppendLine(";");
   247	                    }
   248	                }
   249	
   250	                Sb.AppendLine("}");
   251	            }
   252	
   253	            Sb.AppendLine("}");
   254	
   255	            return Sb.ToString();
   256	        }
   257	
   258	        private string WriteDbContext(ModuleScaffolderOptions scaffolderOptions, RoutineModel model, List<string> schemas)
   259	        {
   260	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(scaffolderOptions);
   261	
   262	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(model);
   263	
   264	            string accessModifier = scaffolderOptions.UseInternalAccessModifier ? "internal" : "public";
   265	
   266	            Sb = new IndentedStringBuilder();
   267	
   268	            Sb.AppendLine(PathHelper.Header);
   269	            var nullable = scaffolderOptions.NullableReferences ? "?" : string.Empty;
   270	            Sb.AppendLine(scaffolderOptions.NullableReferences ? "#nullable enable" : "#nullable disable");
   271	
   272	            var usings = CreateUsings(scaffolderOptions, model, schemas);
   273	
   274	            foreach (var statement in usings)
   275	            {
   276	                Sb.AppendLine($"{statement};");
   277	            }
   278	
   279	            Sb.AppendLine();
   280	            Sb.AppendLine($"namespace {scaffolderOptions.ContextNamespace}");
   281	            Sb.AppendLine("{");
   282	
   283	            using (Sb.Indent())
   284	            {
   285	                Sb.AppendLine($"{accessModifier} partial class {scaffolderOptions.ContextName}");
   286	                Sb.AppendLine("{");
   287	                using (Sb.Indent())
   288	                {
   289	                    Sb.AppendLine($"private I{scaffolderOptions.ContextName}{FileNameSuffix}{nullable} _procedures;");
   290	                    Sb.AppendLine();
   291	                    Sb.AppendLine($"public virtual I{scaffolderOptions.ContextName}{FileNameSuffix} {FileNameSuffix}");
   292	                    Sb.AppendLine("{");
   293	                    using (Sb.Indent())
   294	                    {
   295	                        Sb.AppendLine("get");
   296	                        Sb.AppendLine("{");
   297	                        using (Sb.Indent())
   298	                        {
   299	                            Sb.AppendLine($"if (_procedures is null) _procedures = new {scaffolderOptions.ContextName}{FileNameSuffix}(this);");
   300	                            Sb.AppendLine("return _procedures;");
   301	                        }
   302	
   303	                        Sb.AppendLine("}");
   304	                        Sb.AppendLine("set");
   305	                        Sb.AppendLine("{");
   306	                        using (Sb.Indent())
   307	                        {
   308	                            Sb.AppendLine("_procedures = value;");
   309	                        }
   310	
   311	                        Sb.AppendLine("}");
   312	                    }
   313	
   314	                    Sb.AppendLine("}");
   315	                    Sb.AppendLine();
   316	                    Sb.AppendLine($"public I{scaffolderOptions.ContextName}{FileNameSuffix} Get{FileNameSuffix}()");
   317	                    Sb.AppendLine("{");
   318	                    using (Sb.Indent())
   319	                    {
   320	                        Sb.AppendLine($"return {FileNameSuffix};");
   321	                    }
   322	
   323	                    Sb.AppendLine("}");
   324	                }
   325	
   326	                Sb.AppendLine("}");
   327	                Sb.AppendLine();
   328	
   329	                Sb.AppendLine($"{accessModifier} partial class {scaffolderOptions.ContextName}{FileNameSuffix} : I{scaffolderOptions.ContextName}{FileNameSuffix}");
   330	                Sb.AppendLine("{");
   331	
   332	                using (Sb.Indent())
   333	                {
   334	                    Sb.AppendLine($"private readonly {scaffolderOptions.ContextName} _context;");
   335	                    Sb.AppendLine();
   336	                    Sb.AppendLine($"public {scaffolderOptions.ContextName}{FileNameSuffix}({scaffolderOptions.ContextName} context)");
   337	                    Sb.AppendLine("{");
   338	
   339	                    using (Sb.Indent())
   340	                    {
   341	                        Sb.AppendLine($"_context = context;");
   342	                    }
   343	
   344	                    Sb.AppendLine("}");
   345	                }
   346	
   347	                foreach (var procedure in model.Routines)
   348	                {
   349	                    GenerateProcedure(procedure, model, false, scaffolderOptions.UseAsyncCalls, scaffolderOptions.UsePascalIdentifiers, scaffolderOptions.NullableReferences, scaffolderOptions.UseTypedTvpParameters);
   350	                }
   351	
   352	                if (model.Routines.Exists(r => r.SupportsMultipleResultSet))
   353	                {
   354	                    GenerateDapperSupport(scaffolderOptions.UseAsyncCalls);
   355	                }
   356	
   357	                if (scaffolderOptions.UseTypedTvpParameters && model.Routines.Any(r => r.Parameters.Any(p => p.TvpColumns?.Count > 0)))
   358	                {
   359	                    GenerateToDataTableExtension();
   360	                }
   361	
   362	                Sb.AppendLine("}");
   363	            }
   364	
   365	            Sb.AppendLine("}");
   366	
   367	            return Sb.ToString();
   368	        }
   369	
   370	        private void GenerateDapperSupport(bool useAsyncCalls)
   371	        {
   372	            Sb.AppendLine();
   373	            using (Sb.Indent())
   374	            {
   375	                Sb.AppendLine("private static DynamicParameters CreateDynamic(SqlParameter[] sqlParameters)");
   376	                Sb.AppendLine("{");
   377	                using (Sb.Indent())
   378	                {
   379	                    Sb.AppendLine("var dynamic = new DynamicParameters();");
   380	                    Sb.AppendLine("foreach (var sqlParameter in sqlParameters)");
   381	                    Sb.AppendLine("{");
   382	                    using (Sb.Indent())
   383	                    {
   384	                        Sb.AppendLine("dynamic.Add(sqlParameter.ParameterName, sqlParameter.Value, sqlParameter.DbType, sqlParameter.Direction, sqlParameter.Size, sqlParameter.Precision, sqlParameter.Scale);");
   385	                    }
   386	
   387	                    Sb.AppendLine("}");
   388	                    Sb.AppendLine();
   389	                    Sb.AppendLine("return dynamic;");
   390	                }
   391	
   392	                Sb.AppendLine("}");
   393	            }
   394	
   395	            Sb.AppendLine();
   396	
   397	            using (Sb.Indent())
   398	            {
   399	                if (useAsyncCalls)
   400	                {
   401	                    Sb.AppendLine("private async Task<SqlMapper.GridReader> GetMultiReaderAsync(DbContext db, DynamicParameters dynamic, string sql)");
   402	                }
   403	                else
   404	                {
   405	                    Sb.AppendLine("private SqlMapper.GridReader GetMultiReader(DbContext db, DynamicParameters dynamic, string sql)");
   406	                }
   407	
   408	                Sb.AppendLine("{");
   409	                using (Sb.Indent())
   410	                {
   411	                    Sb.AppendLine("IDbTransaction tran = null;");
   412	                    Sb.AppendLine("if (db.Database.CurrentTransaction is IDbContextTransaction ctxTran)");
   413	                    Sb.AppendLine("{");
   414	                    using (Sb.Indent())
   415	                    {
   416	                        Sb.AppendLine("tran = ctxTran.GetDbTransaction();");
   417	                    }
   418	
   419	                    Sb.AppendLine("}");
   420	                    Sb.AppendLine();
   421	                    Sb.AppendLine($"return {(useAsyncCalls ? "await " : string.Empty)}((IDbConnection)db.Database.GetDbConnection())");
   422	                    using (Sb.Indent())
   423	                    {
   424	                        Sb.AppendLine($".QueryMultiple{(useAsyncCalls ? "Async" : string.Empty)}(sql, dynamic, tran, db.Database.GetCommandTimeout(), CommandType.StoredProcedure);");
   425	                    }
   426	                }
   427	
   428	                Sb.AppendLine("}");
   429	            }
   430	        }
   431	
   432	        private void GenerateToDataTableExtension()
   433	        {
   434	            Sb.AppendLine();
   435	            using (Sb.Indent())
   436	            {
   437	                Sb.AppendLine("private static DataTable ToDataTable<T>(IEnumerable<T> items)");
   438	                Sb.AppendLine("{");
   439	                using (Sb.Indent())
   440	                {
   441	                    Sb.AppendLine("var dataTable = new DataTable();");
   442	                    Sb.AppendLine("var properties = typeof(T).GetProperties();");
   443	                    Sb.AppendLine();
   444	                    Sb.AppendLine("foreach (var prop in properties)");
   445	                    Sb.AppendLine("{");
   446	                    using (Sb.Indent())
   447	                    {
   448	                        Sb.AppendLine("var propertyType = prop.PropertyType;");
   449	                        Sb.AppendLine("if (propertyType.IsGenericType && propertyType.GetGenericTypeDefinition() == typeof(Nullable<>))");
   450	                        Sb.AppendLine("{");
   451	                        using (Sb.Indent())
   452	                        {
   453	                            Sb.AppendLine("propertyType = Nullable.GetUnderlyingType(propertyType);");
   454	                        }
   455	
   456	                        Sb.AppendLine("}");
   457	                        Sb.AppendLine("dataTable.Columns.Add(prop.Name, propertyType);");
   458	                    }
   459	
   460	                    Sb.AppendLine("}");
   461	                    Sb.AppendLine();
   462	                    Sb.AppendLine("foreach (var item in items)");
   463	                    Sb.AppendLine("{");
   464	                    using (Sb.Indent())
   465	                    {
   466	                        Sb.AppendLine("var values = new object[properties.Length];");
   467	                        Sb.AppendLine("for (int i = 0; i < properties.Length; i++)");
   468	                        Sb.AppendLine("{");
   469	                        using (Sb.Indent())
   470	                        {
   471	                            Sb.AppendLine("values[i] = properties[i].GetValue(item) ?? DBNull.Value;");
   472	                        }
   473	
   474	                        Sb.AppendLine("}");
   475	                        Sb.AppendLine("dataTable.Rows.Add(values);");
   476	                    }
   477	
   478	                    Sb.AppendLine("}");
   479	                    Sb.AppendLine();
   480	                    Sb.AppendLine("return dataTable;");
   481	                }
   482	
   483	                Sb.AppendLine("}");
   484	            }
   485	        }
   486	    }
   487	}

    30	        public string WriteResultClass(List<ModuleResultElement> resultElements, ModuleScaffolderOptions options, string name, string schemaName)
    31	        {
    32	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(resultElements);
    33	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(options);

    36	
    37	            Sb = new IndentedStringBuilder();
    38	
    39	            Sb.AppendLine(PathHelper.Header);
    40	
    41	            if (resultElements.Exists(p => typeMapper.GetClrType(p) == typeof(Geometry)))
    42	            {
    43	                Sb.AppendLine("using NetTopologySuite.Geometries;");
    44	            }
    45	
    46	            Sb.AppendLine("using System;");

    52	            }

    67	            {
    68	                GenerateClass(resultElements, name, options.NullableReferences, options.UseDecimalDataAnnotation, options.UsePascalIdentifiers);
    69	            }
    70	
    71	            Sb.AppendLine("}");
    72	
    73	            return Sb.ToString();
    74	        }
    75	
    76	        private void GenerateClass(List<ModuleResultElement> resultElements, string name, bool nullableReferences, bool useDecimalDataAnnotation, bool usePascalCase)
    77	        {
    78	            Sb.AppendLine($"public partial class {name}");
    79	            Sb.AppendLine("{");
    80	
    81	            using (Sb.Indent())
    82	            {
    83	                GenerateProperties(resultElements, nullableReferences, useDecimalDataAnnotation, usePascalCase);
    84	            }
    85	
    86	            Sb.AppendLine("}");
    87	        }
    88	
    89	        private void GenerateProperties(List<ModuleResultElement> resultElements, bool nullableReferences, bool useDecimalDataAnnotation, bool usePascalCase)
    90	        {
    91	            var propertyNames = new List<string>();
    92	
    93	            int i = 0;
    94	
    95	            foreach (var property in resultElements.OrderBy(e => e.Ordinal))
    96	            {
    97	                var propertyNameAndAttribute = ScaffoldHelper.GeneratePropertyName(property.Name, Code, usePascalCase);
    98	
    99	                if (property.StoreType == "decimal" && useDecimalDataAnnotation)
   100	                {
   101	                    Sb.AppendLine($"[Column(\"{property.Name}\", TypeName = \"{property.StoreType}({property.Precision},{property.Scale})\")]");
   102	                }
   103	                else if (property.StoreType == "money" && useDecimalDataAnnotation)
   104	                {
   105	                    Sb.AppendLine($"[Column(\"{property.Name}\", TypeName = \"{property.StoreType}\")]");
   106	                }
   107	                else
   108	                {
   109	                    if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(propertyNameAndAttribute.Item2))
   110	                    {
   111	                        Sb.AppendLine(propertyNameAndAttribute.Item2);
   112	                    }
   113	                }
   114	
   115	                if (useDecimalDataAnnotation
   116	                    && ((property.StoreType.StartsWith("varchar", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
   117	                        || property.StoreType.StartsWith("nvarchar", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
   118	                    && property.MaxLength > 0))
   119	                {
   120	                    Sb.AppendLine($"[StringLength({property.MaxLength})]");
   121	                }
   122	
   123	                var propertyType = typeMapper.GetClrType(property);
   124	                var nullableAnnotation = string.Empty;
   125	                var defaultAnnotation = string.Empty;
   126	
   127	                if (nullableReferences && !propertyType.IsValueType)
   128	                {
   129	                    if (property.Nullable)
   130	                    {
   131	                        nullableAnnotation = "?";
   132	                    }
   133	                    else
   134	                    {
   135	                        defaultAnnotation = $" = default!;";
   136	                    }
   137	                }
   138	
   139	                var propertyName = propertyNameAndAttribute.Item1;
   140	
   141	                if (propertyNames.Contains(propertyName, StringComparer.Ordinal))
   142	                {
   143	                    propertyName = $"{propertyName}_Duplicate{i++}";
   144	                }
   145	
   146	                propertyNames.Add(propertyNameAndAttribute.Item1);
   147	
   148	                Sb.AppendLine($"public {Code.Reference(propertyType)}{nullableAnnotation} {propertyName} {{ get; set; }}{defaultAnnotation}");
   149	            }
   150	        }
   151	    }

2026-05-29 13:14:11,032 - INFO - swea-agent-ErikEJ__EFCorePowerTools-3418 - 💭 THOUGHT
Now I have a clear picture. Let me analyze the problems:

**Problem 1**: `citext` parameter in function. The `GetNpgsqlDbType` method at line 169 tries to parse the store type as an `NpgsqlDbType` enum. `citext` is a PostgreSQL extension type that's not in the `NpgsqlDbType` enum, so `Enum.TryParse` fails and throws `ArgumentOutOfRangeException` with `cleanedTypeName: USER-DEFINED`.

The flow for parameters: `GetClrType(string storeType, ...)` calls `GetNpgsqlDbType(storeType)` first. If that fails, the error message doesn't include the original storeType properly.

**Problem 2**: `citext` return value. Similar issue - the `GetClrType` for `ModuleResultElement` also calls `GetNpgsqlDbType` and fails.

**Problem 3**: The generation stops because exceptions are thrown and not caught, causing the whole process to fail.

Looking at the PR description, the fixes involve:
1. Handling `citext` type (treating it like text/string)
2. Catching exceptions gracefully so generation continues for other items

Let me look at the linked commits to understand the exact fixes. Let me check if there are any other related files:

     1	using System;
     2	using System.Collections.Generic;
     3	using System.Data;
     4	using Npgsql;
     5	using RevEng.Core.Abstractions;
     6	using RevEng.Core.Abstractions.Metadata;
     7	using RevEng.Core.Abstractions.Model;
     8	using RevEng.Core.Routines.Extensions;
     9	
    10	namespace RevEng.Core.Routines.Procedures
    11	{
    12	    public class PostgresStoredProcedureModelFactory : PostgresRoutineModelFactory, IProcedureModelFactory
    13	    {
    14	        public PostgresStoredProcedureModelFactory()
    15	        {
    16	            RoutineType = "PROCEDURE";
    17	
    18	            RoutineSql = $@"
    19	select n.nspname as schema_name,
    20	       p.proname as specific_name,
    21	       p.proretset as returns_set,
    22	       p.prokind as routine_type
    23	from pg_proc p
    24	left join pg_namespace n on p.pronamespace = n.oid
    25	left join pg_language l on p.prolang = l.oid
    26	left join pg_type t on t.oid = p.prorettype 
    27	where n.nspname not in ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema')
    28	      and (p.prokind = 'p' or p.prokind = 'f')
    29	      and (l.lanname = 'sql' or l.lanname = 'plpgsql')
    30	order by schema_name,
    31	         specific_name;";
    32	        }
    33	
    34	        public RoutineModel Create(string connectionString, ModuleModelFactoryOptions options)
    35	        {
    36	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(options);
    37	
    38	            PostgresNpgsqlTypeExtensions.UseDateOnlyTimeOnly = options.UseDateOnlyTimeOnly;
    39	            return GetRoutines(connectionString, options);
    40	        }
    41	
    42	        protected override List<List<ModuleResultElement>> GetResultElementLists(NpgsqlConnection connection, Routine module)
    43	        {
    44	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(connection);
    45	
    46	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(module);
    47	
    48	            using var dtResult = new DataTable();
    49	            var list = new List<ModuleResultElement>();
    50	
    51	            var sql = $@"
    52	    with cte1 as (
    53	        select
    54	            lower(r.routine_type) as type,
    55	            quote_ident(r.specific_schema) as schema,
    56	            quote_ident(r.routine_name) as name,
    57	            proc.oid as oid,
    58	            r.specific_name,
    59	            des.description as comment,
    60	            proc.proisstrict as is_strict,
    61	            proc.provolatile as volatility_option,
    62	            proc.proretset as returns_set,
    63	            (r.type_udt_schema || '.' || r.type_udt_name)::regtype::text as return_type,
    64	
    65	            coalesce(
    66	                array_agg(quote_ident(p.parameter_name::text) order by p.ordinal_position) filter(where p.parameter_mode = 'IN' or p.parameter_mode = 'INOUT'),
    67	                '{{}}'::text[]
    68	            ) as in_params,
    69	
    70	            case when r.data_type = 'USER-DEFINED' then null
    71	            else
    72	                coalesce(
    73	                    (array_agg(quote_ident(p.parameter_name::text) order by p.ordinal_position) 
    74	                    filter(where p.parameter_mode = 'INOUT' or p.parameter_mode = 'OUT')),
    75	                    '{{}}'::text[]
    76	                )
    77	            end as out_params,
    78	
    79	            coalesce(
    80	                array_agg(
    81	                    case when p.data_type = 'bit' then 'varbit' else (p.udt_schema || '.' || p.udt_name)::regtype::text end
    82	                    order by p.ordinal_position
    83	                ) filter(where p.parameter_mode = 'IN' or p.parameter_mode = 'INOUT'),
    84	                '{{}}'::text[]
    85	            ) as in_param_types,
    86	
    87	            case when r.data_type = 'USER-DEFINED' then null
    88	            else
    89	                coalesce(
    90	                    (array_agg(case when p.data_type = 'bit' then 'varbit' else (p.udt_schema || '.' || p.udt_name)::regtype::text end 
    91	                               order by p.ordinal_position) 
    92	                    filter(where p.parameter_mode = 'INOUT' or p.parameter_mode = 'OUT')),
    93	                    '{{}}'::text[]
    94	                )
    95	            end as out_param_types,
    96	
    97	            coalesce(
    98	                array_agg(p.parameter_default order by p.ordinal_position) filter(where p.parameter_mode = 'IN' or p.parameter_mode = 'INOUT'),
    99	                '{{}}'::text[]
   100	            ) as in_param_defaults,
   101	
   102	            case when proc.provariadic <> 0 then true else false end as has_variadic,
   103	
   104	            r.type_udt_schema,
   105	            r.type_udt_name,
   106	            r.data_type
   107	        from
   108	            information_schema.routines r
   109	            join pg_catalog.pg_proc proc on r.specific_name = proc.proname || '_' || proc.oid
   110	            left join pg_catalog.pg_description des on proc.oid = des.objoid
   111	            left join information_schema.parameters p on r.specific_name = p.specific_name and r.specific_schema = p.specific_schema
   112	
   113	        where
   114	            r.specific_schema = any(
   115	                select
   116	                    nspname
   117	                from
   118	                    pg_catalog.pg_namespace
   119	                where
   120	                    nspname not like 'pg_%'
   121	                    and nspname <> 'information_schema'
   122	            )
   123	            and proc.prokind in ('f', 'p')
   124	            and not lower(r.external_language) = any(array['c', 'internal'])
   125	            and coalesce(r.type_udt_name, '') <> 'trigger'
   126	        group by
   127	            r.routine_type, r.specific_schema, r.routine_name,
   128	            proc.oid, r.specific_name, des.description,
   129	            r.data_type, r.type_udt_schema, r.type_udt_name,
   130	            proc.proisstrict, proc.procost, proc.prorows, proc.proparallel, proc.provolatile,
   131	            proc.proretset, proc.provariadic
   132	
   133	    ), cte2 as (
   134	
   135	        select 
   136	            cte1.schema, 
   137	            cte1.specific_name,
   138	            array_agg(quote_ident(col.column_name) order by col.ordinal_position) as out_params,
   139	            array_agg(
   140	                case when col.data_type = 'bit' then 'varbit' else (col.udt_schema || '.' || col.udt_name)::regtype::text end
   141	                order by col.ordinal_position
   142	            ) as out_param_types
   143	        from 
   144	            information_schema.columns col
   145	            join cte1 on 
   146	            cte1.data_type = 'USER-DEFINED' and col.table_schema = cte1.type_udt_schema and col.table_name = cte1.type_udt_name 
   147	        group by
   148	           cte1.schema, cte1.specific_name
   149	
   150	    )
   151	    select
   152	        type,
   153	        cte1.schema,
   154	        cte1.name,
   155	        is_strict,
   156	        volatility_option,
   157	
   158	        returns_set,
   159	        coalesce(return_type, 'void') as return_type,
   160	
   161	        coalesce(array_length(coalesce(cte1.out_params, cte2.out_params), 1), 1) as return_record_count,
   162	        case 
   163	            when array_length(coalesce(cte1.out_params, cte2.out_params), 1) is null 
   164	            then array[cte1.name]::text[] 
   165	            else coalesce(cte1.out_params, cte2.out_params) 
   166	        end as return_record_names,
   167	
   168	        case 
   169	            when array_length(coalesce(cte1.out_param_types, cte2.out_param_types), 1) is null 
   170	            then array[return_type]::text[] 
   171	            else coalesce(cte1.out_param_types, cte2.out_param_types)
   172	        end as return_record_types,
   173	
   174	        coalesce(cte1.out_params, cte2.out_params) = '{{}}' as is_unnamed_record
   175	
   176	    from cte1
   177	    left join cte2 on cte1.schema = cte2.schema and cte1.specific_name = cte2.specific_name
   178		where cte1.schema = '{module.Schema}' and (cte1.name = '{module.Name}' or cte1.name = '""{module.Name}""')";
   179	
   180	#pragma warning disable CA2100 // Review SQL queries for security vulnerabilities
   181	            using var adapter = new NpgsqlDataAdapter
   182	            {
   183	                SelectCommand = new NpgsqlCommand(sql, connection),
   184	            };
   185	#pragma warning restore CA2100 // Review SQL queries for security vulnerabilities
   186	
   187	            adapter.Fill(dtResult);
   188	
   189	            if (dtResult.Rows.Count != 0)
   190	            {
   191	                var row = dtResult.Rows[0];
   192	                var hasSet = bool.Parse(row["returns_set"].ToString() ?? "false");
   193	                if (hasSet)
   194	                {
   195	                    var names = (string[])row["return_record_names"];
   196	                    var types = (string[])row["return_record_types"];
   197	                    for (var i = 0; i < names.Length; i++)
   198	                    {
   199	                        var name = names[i];
   200	
   201	                        if (name.StartsWith('"') && name.EndsWith('"'))
   202	                        {
   203	                            name = name.Substring(1, name.Length - 2);
   204	                        }
   205	
   206	                        list.Add(new ModuleResultElement
   207	                        {
   208	                            Name = name,
   209	                            StoreType = types[i],
   210	                            Ordinal = i,
   211	                            Nullable = true,
   212	                        });
   213	                    }
   214	                }
   215	            }
   216	
   217	            var result = new List<List<ModuleResultElement>>
   218	            {
   219	                list,
   220	            };
   221	
   222	            return result;
   223	        }
   224	    }
   225	}

     1	﻿using System;
     2	using System.Collections.Generic;
     3	using System.Data;
     4	using System.Globalization;
     5	using System.Linq;
     6	using Npgsql;
     7	using RevEng.Core.Abstractions;
     8	using RevEng.Core.Abstractions.Metadata;
     9	
    10	namespace RevEng.Core.Routines
    11	{
    12	    public abstract class PostgresRoutineModelFactory
    13	    {
    14	        public string RoutineSql { get; set; }
    15	
    16	        public string RoutineType { get; set; }
    17	
    18	#pragma warning disable CA1716 // Identifiers should not match keywords
    19	        protected abstract List<List<ModuleResultElement>> GetResultElementLists(NpgsqlConnection connection, Routine module);
    20	#pragma warning restore CA1716 // Identifiers should not match keywords
    21	
    22	        protected RoutineModel GetRoutines(string connectionString, ModuleModelFactoryOptions options)
    23	        {
    24	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(options);
    25	
    26	            var result = new List<Routine>();
    27	            var found = new List<Tuple<string, string, bool, char>>();
    28	            var errors = new List<string>();
    29	
    30	            var filter = options.Modules.ToHashSet();
    31	
    32	            using (var connection = new NpgsqlConnection(connectionString))
    33	            {
    34	#pragma warning disable CA2100 // Review SQL queries for security vulnerabilities
    35	                using (var command = new NpgsqlCommand(RoutineSql, connection))
    36	                {
    37	                    connection.Open();
    38	
    39	                    if (connection.PostgreSqlVersion.Major < 11)
    40	                    {
    41	                        return new RoutineModel
    42	                        {
    43	                            Routines = result,
    44	                            Errors = errors,
    45	                        };
    46	                    }
    47	
    48	                    using (var reader = command.ExecuteReader())
    49	                    {
    50	                        while (reader.Read())
    51	                        {
    52	                            // Schema, Name, IsScalar, Type (f or p)
    53	                            found.Add(new Tuple<string, string, bool, char>(reader.GetString(0), reader.GetString(1), reader.GetFieldValue<bool>(2), reader.GetChar(3)));
    54	                        }
    55	                    }
    56	                }
    57	#pragma warning restore CA2100 // Review SQL queries for security vulnerabilities
    58	
    59	                var allParameters = options.FullModel && found.Count != 0 ? GetParameters(connection) : new Dictionary<string, List<ModuleParameter>>();
    60	
    61	                foreach (var foundModule in found)
    62	                {
    63	                    var key = $"{foundModule.Item1}.{foundModule.Item2}";
    64	
    65	                    if (filter.Count == 0 || filter.Contains(key))
    66	                    {
    67	                        var isScalar = false; //// !foundModule.Item3;
    68	
    69	                        var module = RoutineType == "PROCEDURE"
    70	                            ? (Routine)new Procedure()
    71	                            : new Function { IsScalar = isScalar };
    72	
    73	                        module.Schema = foundModule.Item1;
    74	                        module.Name = foundModule.Item2;
    75	                        module.IsScalar = foundModule.Item4 == 'f';
    76	
    77	                        if (options.FullModel)
    78	                        {
    79	                            module.HasValidResultSet = true;
    80	
    81	                            if (options.MappedModules?.ContainsKey(key) ?? false)
    82	                            {
    83	                                module.MappedType = options.MappedModules[key];
    84	                            }
    85	
    86	                            if (allParameters.TryGetValue($"{module.Schema}.{module.Name}", out var moduleParameters))
    87	                            {
    88	                                module.Parameters = moduleParameters;
    89	                            }
    90	
    91	#pragma warning disable CA1031 // Do not catch general exception types
    92	                            try
    93	                            {
    94	                                module.Results.AddRange(GetResultElementLists(connection, module));
    95	                            }
    96	                            catch (Exception ex)
    97	                            {
    98	                                module.HasValidResultSet = false;
    99	                                module.Results = new List<List<ModuleResultElement>>
   100	                                {
   101	                                    new List<ModuleResultElement>(),
   102	                                };
   103	#pragma warning disable CA1308 // Normalize strings to uppercase
   104	                                errors.Add($"Unable to get result set shape for {RoutineType.ToLower(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)} '{module.Schema}.{module.Name}'. {ex.Message}.");
   105	#pragma warning restore CA1308 // Normalize strings to uppercase
   106	                            }
   107	#pragma warning restore CA1031 // Do not catch general exception types
   108	                        }
   109	
   110	                        if (!isScalar)
   111	                        {
   112	                            result.Add(module);
   113	                        }
   114	                    }
   115	                }
   116	            }
   117	
   118	            return new RoutineModel
   119	            {
   120	                Routines = result,
   121	                Errors = errors,
   122	            };
   123	        }
   124	
   125	        private static Dictionary<string, List<ModuleParameter>> GetParameters(NpgsqlConnection connection)
   126	        {
   127	            using var dtResult = new DataTable();
   128	            var result = new List<ModuleParameter>();
   129	
   130	            var sql = $@"
   131	select proc.specific_schema as procedure_schema,
   132	       proc.routine_name as procedure_name,
   133	       args.parameter_name,
   134	       args.parameter_mode,
   135	       args.data_type,
   136		   args.character_maximum_length,
   137		   args.numeric_precision,
   138		   args.numeric_scale
   139	from information_schema.routines proc
   140	left join information_schema.parameters args
   141	          on proc.specific_schema = args.specific_schema
   142	          and proc.specific_name = args.specific_name
   143	where proc.routine_schema not in ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema')
   144	     and (proc.routine_type = 'PROCEDURE' OR proc.routine_type = 'FUNCTION')
   145	order by procedure_schema,
   146	         proc.specific_name,
   147	         procedure_name,
   148	         args.ordinal_position;";
   149	
   150	            using var adapter = new NpgsqlDataAdapter
   151	            {
   152	                SelectCommand = new NpgsqlCommand(sql, connection),
   153	            };
   154	
   155	            adapter.Fill(dtResult);
   156	
   157	            foreach (DataRow par in dtResult.Rows)
   158	            {
   159	                if (par != null)
   160	                {
   161	                    var parameter = new ModuleParameter()
   162	                    {
   163	                        Name = par["parameter_name"].ToString(),
   164	                        RoutineName = par["procedure_name"].ToString(),
   165	                        RoutineSchema = par["procedure_schema"].ToString(),
   166	                        StoreType = par["data_type"].ToString(),
   167	                        Length = (par["character_maximum_length"] is DBNull) ? (int?)null : int.Parse(par["character_maximum_length"].ToString()!, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture),
   168	                        Precision = (par["numeric_precision"] is DBNull) ? (int?)null : int.Parse(par["Precision"].ToString()!, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture),
   169	                        Scale = (par["numeric_scale"] is DBNull) ? (int?)null : int.Parse(par["Scale"].ToString()!, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture),
   170	                        Output = par["parameter_mode"].ToString() == "INOUT",
   171	                        Nullable = true,
   172	                    };
   173	
   174	                    if (par["parameter_mode"].ToString() != "OUT")
   175	                    {
   176	                        result.Add(parameter);
   177	                    }
   178	                }
   179	            }
   180	
   181	            return result.GroupBy(x => $"{x.RoutineSchema}.{x.RoutineName}").ToDictionary(g => g.Key, g => g.ToList(), StringComparer.InvariantCulture);
   182	        }
   183	    }
   184	}

2026-05-29 13:14:47,680 - INFO - swea-agent-ErikEJ__EFCorePowerTools-3418 - 💭 THOUGHT
Now I understand the full picture. Let me trace through the error scenarios:

1. **Problem 1**: When a function has a `citext` parameter, the `StoreType` from `information_schema.parameters` is `USER-DEFINED` (since citext is an extension type). Then `GetNpgsqlDbType("USER-DEFINED")` is called, which tries `Enum.TryParse("USER-DEFINED", ...)` and fails.

2. **Problem 2**: When a function returns `citext`, the return type is `citext`. Then `GetNpgsqlDbType("citext")` is called, which tries `Enum.TryParse("citext", ...)` and fails.

The fixes from the PR description are:
- Handle `citext` as a string type (maps to `NpgsqlDbType.Text` or similar)
- Catch exceptions so generation doesn't stop entirely

Let me check if there are test files to understand the expected

OBSERVATION:

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Collections.ObjectModel;
using System.Linq;
using NpgsqlTypes;
using RevEng.Core.Abstractions.Metadata;

namespace RevEng.Core.Routines.Extensions
{
    public static class PostgresNpgsqlTypeExtensions
    {
        private static readonly HashSet<NpgsqlDbType> ScaleTypes =
        [
            NpgsqlDbType.Numeric,
            NpgsqlDbType.Money,
        ];

        private static readonly HashSet<NpgsqlDbType> VarTimeTypes =
        [
            NpgsqlDbType.TimestampTz,
            NpgsqlDbType.Timestamp,
            NpgsqlDbType.Time,
        ];

        private static readonly HashSet<NpgsqlDbType> LengthRequiredTypes =
        [
            NpgsqlDbType.Varchar,
            NpgsqlDbType.Char,
        ];

        private static readonly ReadOnlyDictionary<string, string> SqlTypeAliases
        = new ReadOnlyDictionary<string, string>(
            new Dictionary<string, string>()
            {
                { "bool", "boolean" },
                { "decimal", "numeric" },
                { "double precision", "double" },
                { "float8", "double" },
                { "character varying", "varchar" },
                { "character", "char" },
                { "float4", "real" },
                { "int", "integer" },
                { "int4", "integer" },
                { "timestamp with time zone", "timestamptz" },
                { "time with time zone", "timetz" },
                { "timestamp without time zone", "timestamp" },
                { "time without time zone", "time" },

                ////{ "character varying[]", "text[]" },
                ////{ "character[]", "char[]" },
                ////{ "timestamp with time zone[]", "timestamp[]" },
                ////{ "timestamp without time zone[]", "timestamp[]" },
                ////{ "time with time zone[]", "time[]" },
                ////{ "time without time zone[]", "time[]" },
                ////{ "double precision[]", "float8[]" },
                ////{ "real[]", "float4[]" },
                ////{ "integer[]", "int[]" },
                ////{ "boolean[]", "bool[]" },
            });

        public static bool UseDateOnlyTimeOnly { get; set; }

        public static bool IsScaleType(this NpgsqlDbType dbType)
        {
            return ScaleTypes.Contains(dbType);
        }

        public static bool IsVarTimeType(this NpgsqlDbType dbType)
        {
            return VarTimeTypes.Contains(dbType);
        }

        public static bool IsLengthRequiredType(this NpgsqlDbType dbType)
        {
            return LengthRequiredTypes.Contains(dbType);
        }

        public static Type ClrTypeFromNpgsqlParameter(this ModuleParameter storedProcedureParameter, bool asMethodParameter = false)
        {
            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(storedProcedureParameter);

            return GetClrType(storedProcedureParameter.StoreType, storedProcedureParameter.Nullable, storedProcedureParameter.Name, asMethodParameter);
        }

        public static NpgsqlDbType GetNpgsqlDbType(this ModuleParameter storedProcedureParameter)
        {
            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(storedProcedureParameter);

            return GetNpgsqlDbType(storedProcedureParameter.StoreType);
        }

        public static Type GetClrType(this ModuleResultElement moduleResultElement)
        {
            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(moduleResultElement);

            return GetClrType(moduleResultElement.StoreType, moduleResultElement.Nullable, moduleResultElement.Name);
        }

        public static Type GetClrType(string storeType, bool isNullable, string objectName, bool asParameter = false)
        {
            var sqlType = GetNpgsqlDbType(storeType);

            var useDateOnlyTimeOnly = UseDateOnlyTimeOnly;

            switch (sqlType)
            {
                case NpgsqlDbType.Bigint:
                    return isNullable ? typeof(long?) : typeof(long);

                case NpgsqlDbType.Bytea:
                    return typeof(byte[]);

                case NpgsqlDbType.Boolean:
                    return isNullable ? typeof(bool?) : typeof(bool);

                case NpgsqlDbType.Char:
                case NpgsqlDbType.Text:
                case NpgsqlDbType.Varchar:
                case NpgsqlDbType.Json:
                case NpgsqlDbType.Jsonb:
                case NpgsqlDbType.Xml:
                case NpgsqlDbType.TsQuery:
                    return typeof(string);

                case NpgsqlDbType.Date:
                    if (useDateOnlyTimeOnly)
                    {
                        return isNullable ? typeof(DateOnly?) : typeof(DateOnly);
                    }

                    return isNullable ? typeof(DateTime?) : typeof(DateTime);

                case NpgsqlDbType.Double:
                    return isNullable ? typeof(double?) : typeof(double);

                case NpgsqlDbType.Integer:
                    return isNullable ? typeof(int?) : typeof(int);

                case NpgsqlDbType.Numeric:
                case NpgsqlDbType.Money:
                    return isNullable ? typeof(decimal?) : typeof(decimal);

                case NpgsqlDbType.Real:
                    return isNullable ? typeof(float?) : typeof(float);

                case NpgsqlDbType.Smallint:
                    return isNullable ? typeof(short?) : typeof(short);

                case NpgsqlDbType.Time:
                    if (useDateOnlyTimeOnly)
                    {
                        return isNullable ? typeof(TimeOnly?) : typeof(TimeOnly);
                    }

                    return isNullable ? typeof(TimeSpan?) : typeof(TimeSpan);

                case NpgsqlDbType.TimestampTz:
                case NpgsqlDbType.Timestamp:
                    return isNullable ? typeof(DateTime?) : typeof(DateTime);

                case NpgsqlDbType.Uuid:
                    return isNullable ? typeof(Guid?) : typeof(Guid);

                default:
                    throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(storeType), $"storetype: {storeType}, objectName: {objectName}");
            }
        }

        private static NpgsqlDbType GetNpgsqlDbType(string storeType)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(storeType))
            {
                throw new ArgumentException("storeType not specified");
            }

            var cleanedTypeName = RemoveMatchingBraces(storeType);

            if (cleanedTypeName == null)
            {
                throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(storeType), $"Unable to remove braces: {storeType}");
            }

#pragma warning disable CA1308 // Normalize strings to uppercase
            if (SqlTypeAliases.TryGetValue(cleanedTypeName.ToLowerInvariant(), out var alias))
            {
                cleanedTypeName = alias;
            }
#pragma warning restore CA1308 // Normalize strings to uppercase

            if (!Enum.TryParse(cleanedTypeName, true, out NpgsqlDbType result))
            {
                throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(storeType), $"cleanedTypeName: {cleanedTypeName}");
            }

            return result;
        }

        private static string RemoveMatchingBraces(string s)
        {
            var stack = new Stack<char>();
            var count = 0;
            foreach (var ch in s)
            {
                switch (ch)
                {
                    case '(':
                        count += 1;
                        stack.Push(ch);
                        break;
                    case ')':
                        if (count == 0)
                        {
                            stack.Push(ch);
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            char popped;
                            do
                            {
                                popped = stack.Pop();
                            }
                            while (popped != '(');
                            count -= 1;
                        }

                        break;
                    default:
                        stack.Push(ch);
                        break;
                }
            }

            return string.Join(string.Empty, stack.Reverse());
        }
    }
}

- Problem 2: `Scaffolder.WriteResultClass` at line 41 - `resultElements.Exists(p => typeMapper.GetClrType(p) == typeof(Geometry))`

**Fix 1**: In `GetNpgsqlDbType`, we need to handle the case where the storeType is `citext` (or other `USER-DEFINED` types that map to known types).      1	﻿using System;
     2	using RevEng.Core.Routines.Extensions;
     3	using Xunit;
     4	
     5	namespace UnitTests
     6	{
     7	    public class SqlServerTypeExtensionsTest
     8	    {
     9	        [Fact]
    10	        public void CanParseTypes()
    11	        {
    12	            var typeNames = new string[]
    13	            {
    14	                "bigint",
    15	                "binary",
    16	                "bit",
    17	                "char",
    18	                "date",
    19	                "datetime",
    20	                "datetime2",
    21	                "datetimeoffset",
    22	                "decimal",
    23	                "float",
    24	                "geography",
    25	                "geometry",
    26	                "hierarchyid",
    27	                "image",
    28	                "int",
    29	                "money",
    30	                "nchar",
    31	                "ntext",
    32	                "numeric",
    33	                "nvarchar",
    34	                "real",
    35	                "smalldatetime",
    36	                "smallint",
    37	                "smallmoney",
    38	                "sql_variant",
    39	                "sysname",
    40	                "text",
    41	                "time",
    42	                "timestamp",
    43	                "tinyint",
    44	                "uniqueidentifier",
    45	                "varbinary",
    46	                "varchar",
    47	                "xml",
    48	            };
    49	
    50	            foreach (var typeName in typeNames)
    51	            {
    52	                try
    53	                {
    54	                    SqlServerSqlTypeExtensions.UseDateOnlyTimeOnly = false;
    55	
    56	                    var res1 = SqlServerSqlTypeExtensions.GetClrType(typeName, true);
    57	
    58	                    if (typeName == "date")
    59	                    {
    60	                        Assert.Equal(typeof(DateTime?), res1);
    61	                    }
    62	
    63	                    if (typeName == "time")
    64	                    {
    65	                        Assert.Equal(typeof(TimeSpan?), res1);
    66	                    }
    67	
    68	                    var res2 = SqlServerSqlTypeExtensions.GetClrType(typeName, false);
    69	
    70	                    if (typeName == "date")
    71	                    {
    72	                        Assert.Equal(typeof(DateTime), res2);
    73	                    }
    74	
    75	                    if (typeName == "time")
    76	                    {
    77	                        Assert.Equal(typeof(TimeSpan), res2);
    78	                    }
    79	
    80	                    SqlServerSqlTypeExtensions.UseDateOnlyTimeOnly = true;
    81	
    82	                    var res3 = SqlServerSqlTypeExtensions.GetClrType(typeName, true);
    83	
    84	                    if (typeName == "date")
    85	                    {
    86	                        Assert.Equal(typeof(DateOnly?), res3);
    87	                    }
    88	
    89	                    if (typeName == "time")
    90	                    {
    91	                        Assert.Equal(typeof(TimeOnly?), res3);
    92	                    }
    93	
    94	                    var res4 = SqlServerSqlTypeExtensions.GetClrType(typeName, false);
    95	
    96	                    if (typeName == "date")
    97	                    {
    98	                        Assert.Equal(typeof(DateOnly), res4);
    99	                    }
   100	
   101	                    if (typeName == "time")
   102	                    {
   103	                        Assert.Equal(typeof(TimeOnly), res4);
   104	                    }
   105	                }
   106	                catch
   107	                {
   108	                    System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine("problem type: " + typeName);
   109	                    throw;
   110	                }
   111	            }
   112	        }
   113	
   114	        [Theory]
   115	        [InlineData("nvarchar", 100, 50)]
   116	        [InlineData("nchar", 20, 10)]
   117	        [InlineData("sysname", 256, 128)]
   118	        [InlineData("varchar", 50, 50)]
   119	        [InlineData("varbinary", 32, 32)]
   120	        [InlineData("nvarchar", -1, -1)]
   121	        [InlineData("nvarchar", null, null)]
   122	        public void NormalizeParameterLengthUsesCharacterLengthForUnicodeParameters(string storeType, int? length, int? expected)
   123	        {
   124	            var normalized = SqlServerSqlTypeExtensions.NormalizeParameterLength(storeType, length);
   125	
   126	            Assert.Equal(expected, normalized);
   127	        }
   128	    }
