    12	namespace RevEng.Core.Routines
    13	{
    14	    public class Scaffolder
    15	    {
    16	#pragma warning disable SA1401 // Fields should be private
    17	        internal readonly ICSharpHelper Code;
    18	        internal IndentedStringBuilder Sb;
    19	#pragma warning restore SA1401 // Fields should be private
    20	        private readonly IClrTypeMapper typeMapper;
    21	
    22	        public Scaffolder([System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNull] ICSharpHelper code, IClrTypeMapper typeMapper)
    23	        {
    24	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(code);
    25	
    26	            Code = code;
    27	            this.typeMapper = typeMapper;
    28	        }
    29	
    30	        public string WriteResultClass(List<ModuleResultElement> resultElements, ModuleScaffolderOptions options, string name, string schemaName)
    31	        {
    32	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(resultElements);
    33	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(options);
    34	
    35	            var @namespace = options.ModelNamespace;
    36	
    37	            Sb = new IndentedStringBuilder();
    38	
    39	            Sb.AppendLine(PathHelper.Header);
    40	
    41	            try
    42	            {
    43	                if (resultElements.Exists(p => typeMapper.GetClrType(p) == typeof(Geometry)))
    44	                {
    45	                    Sb.AppendLine("using NetTopologySuite.Geometries;");
    46	                }
    47	            }
    48	            catch (ArgumentOutOfRangeException)
    49	            {
    50	                // Unsupported result element type - skip Geometry using
    51	            }
    52	
    53	            Sb.AppendLine("using System;");
    54	            Sb.AppendLine("using System.Collections.Generic;");
    55	
    56	            if (options.UseDecimalDataAnnotation)
    57	            {
    58	                Sb.AppendLine("using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;");
    59	            }
    60	
    61	            Sb.AppendLine("using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.Schema;");
    62	            Sb.AppendLine();
    63	
    64	            if (options.NullableReferences)
    65	            {
    66	                Sb.AppendLine("#nullable enable");
    67	                Sb.AppendLine();
    68	            }
    69	
    70	            Sb.AppendLine($"namespace {@namespace}{(options.UseSchemaNamespaces ? $".{schemaName}Schema" : string.Empty)}");
    71	            Sb.AppendLine("{");
    72	
    73	            using (Sb.Indent())
    74	            {
    75	                GenerateClass(resultElements, name, options.NullableReferences, options.UseDecimalDataAnnotation, options.UsePascalIdentifiers);
    76	            }
    77	
    78	            Sb.AppendLine("}");
    79	
    80	            return Sb.ToString();
    81	        }
    82	
    83	        private void GenerateClass(List<ModuleResultElement> resultElements, string name, bool nullableReferences, bool useDecimalDataAnnotation, bool usePascalCase)
    84	        {
    85	            Sb.AppendLine($"public partial class {name}");
    86	            Sb.AppendLine("{");
    87	
    88	            using (Sb.Indent())
    89	            {
    90	                GenerateProperties(resultElements, nullableReferences, useDecimalDataAnnotation, usePascalCase);
    91	            }
    92	
    93	            Sb.AppendLine("}");
    94	        }
    95	
    96	        private void GenerateProperties(List<ModuleResultElement> resultElements, bool nullableReferences, bool useDecimalDataAnnotation, bool usePascalCase)
    97	        {
    98	            var propertyNames = new List<string>();
    99	
   100	            int i = 0;
   101	
   102	            foreach (var property in resultElements.OrderBy(e => e.Ordinal))
   103	            {
   104	                var propertyNameAndAttribute = ScaffoldHelper.GeneratePropertyName(property.Name, Code, usePascalCase);
   105	
   106	                if (property.StoreType == "decimal" && useDecimalDataAnnotation)
   107	                {
   108	                    Sb.AppendLine($"[Column(\"{property.Name}\", TypeName = \"{property.StoreType}({property.Precision},{property.Scale})\")]");
   109	                }
   110	                else if (property.StoreType == "money" && useDecimalDataAnnotation)
   111	                {
   112	                    Sb.AppendLine($"[Column(\"{property.Name}\", TypeName = \"{property.StoreType}\")]");
   113	                }
   114	                else
   115	                {
   116	                    if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(propertyNameAndAttribute.Item2))
   117	                    {
   118	                        Sb.AppendLine(propertyNameAndAttribute.Item2);
   119	                    }
   120	                }
   121	
   122	                if (useDecimalDataAnnotation
   123	                    && ((property.StoreType.StartsWith("varchar", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
   124	                        || property.StoreType.StartsWith("nvarchar", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
   125	                    && property.MaxLength > 0))
   126	                {
   127	                    Sb.AppendLine($"[StringLength({property.MaxLength})]");
   128	                }
   129	
   130	                Type propertyType;
   131	                try
   132	                {
   133	                    propertyType = typeMapper.GetClrType(property);
   134	                }
   135	                catch (ArgumentOutOfRangeException)
   136	                {
   137	                    // Unsupported property type, skip this property
   138	                    continue;
   139	                }
   140	                var nullableAnnotation = string.Empty;
   141	                var defaultAnnotation = string.Empty;
   142	
   143	                if (nullableReferences && !propertyType.IsValueType)
   144	                {
   145	                    if (property.Nullable)
   146	                    {
   147	                        nullableAnnotation = "?";
   148	                    }
   149	                    else
   150	                    {
   151	                        defaultAnnotation = $" = default!;";
   152	                    }
   153	                }
   154	
   155	                var propertyName = propertyNameAndAttribute.Item1;
   156	
   157	                if (propertyNames.Contains(propertyName, StringComparer.Ordinal))
   158	                {
   159	                    propertyName = $"{propertyName}_Duplicate{i++}";
   160	                }
   161	
   162	                propertyNames.Add(propertyNameAndAttribute.Item1);
   163	
   164	                Sb.AppendLine($"public {Code.Reference(propertyType)}{nullableAnnotation} {propertyName} {{ get; set; }}{defaultAnnotation}");
   165	            }
   166	        }
   167	    }
   168	}

    18	        public PostgresStoredProcedureScaffolder([NotNull] ICSharpHelper code, IClrTypeMapper typeMapper)

    20	        {
    21	            FileNameSuffix = "Functions";
    22	            ProviderUsing = "using Npgsql";

    25	        public new SavedModelFiles Save(ScaffoldedModel scaffoldedModel, string outputDir, string nameSpaceValue, bool useAsyncCalls, bool useInternalAccessModifier, bool useNullableReferences)
    26	        {
    27	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(scaffoldedModel);
    28	
    29	            var files = base.Save(scaffoldedModel, outputDir, nameSpaceValue, useAsyncCalls, useInternalAccessModifier, useNullableReferences);
    30	            var accessModifier = useInternalAccessModifier ? "internal" : "public";
    31	
    32	            var contextDir = Path.GetDirectoryName(Path.Combine(outputDir, scaffoldedModel.ContextFile.Path));
    33	            var dbContextExtensionsText = ScaffoldHelper.GetDbContextExtensionsText(useAsyncCalls);
    34	            var dbContextExtensionsName = useAsyncCalls ? "DbContextExtensions.cs" : "DbContextExtensions.Sync.cs";
    35	            var dbContextExtensionsPath = Path.Combine(contextDir ?? string.Empty, dbContextExtensionsName);
    36	            File.WriteAllText(
    37	                dbContextExtensionsPath,
    38	                dbContextExtensionsText
    39	                    .Replace("#NAMESPACE#", nameSpaceValue, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
    40	                    .Replace("#ACCESSMODIFIER#", accessModifier, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
    41	                    .Replace("#NULLABLE#", useNullableReferences ? "?" : string.Empty, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
    42	                    .Replace("#NULLABLEENABLE#", useNullableReferences ? "enable" : "disable", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase),
    43	                Encoding.UTF8);
    44	            files.AdditionalFiles.Add(dbContextExtensionsPath);
    45	
    46	            return files;
    47	        }
    48	
    49	        protected override void GenerateProcedure(Routine procedure, RoutineModel model, bool signatureOnly, bool useAsyncCalls, bool usePascalCase, bool useNullableReferences, bool useTypedTvpParameters)
    50	        {
    51	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(procedure);
    52	
    53	            var paramStrings = procedure.Parameters.Where(p => !p.Output)
    54	                .Select(p =>
    55	                {
    56	                    // Stored procedure Parameters are always nullable.
    57	                    var type = Code.Reference(p.ClrTypeFromNpgsqlParameter(asMethodParameter: true));
    58	                    if (useNullableReferences && !type.EndsWith('?'))
    59	                    {
    60	                        type += "?";
    61	                    }
    62	
    63	                    return $"{type} {Code.Identifier(p.Name, capitalize: false)}";
    64	                })
    65	                .ToList();
    66	
    67	            var outParams = procedure.Parameters.Where(p => p.Output).ToList();
    68	
    69	            var outParamStrings = outParams
    70	                .Select(p => $"OutputParameter<{Code.Reference(p.ClrTypeFromNpgsqlParameter())}> {Code.Identifier(p.Name, capitalize: false)}")
    71	                .ToList();
    72	
    73	            var fullExec = GenerateProcedureStatement(procedure, useAsyncCalls);
    74	
    75	            var identifier = ScaffoldHelper.GenerateIdentifierName(procedure, model, Code, usePascalCase);
    76	
    77	            var returnClass = identifier + "Result";
    78	
    79	            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(procedure.MappedType))
    80	            {
    81	                returnClass = procedure.MappedType;
    82	            }
    83	
    84	            var line = GenerateMethodSignature(procedure, outParams, paramStrings, outParamStrings, identifier, signatureOnly, useAsyncCalls, returnClass, useNullableReferences);
    85	
    86	            if (signatureOnly)
    87	            {
    88	                Sb.Append(line);
    89	                return;
    90	            }
    91	
    92	            using (Sb.Indent())
    93	            {
    94	                Sb.AppendLine();
    95	
    96	                Sb.AppendLine(line);
    97	                Sb.AppendLine("{");
    98	
    99	                using (Sb.Indent())
   100	                {
   101	                    foreach (var parameter in outParams)
   102	                    {
   103	                        GenerateParameterVar(parameter);
   104	                    }
   105	
   106	                    Sb.AppendLine("var npgsqlParameters = new []");
   107	                    Sb.AppendLine("{");
   108	                    using (Sb.Indent())
   109	                    {
   110	                        foreach (var parameter in procedure.Parameters)
   111	                        {
   112	                            if (parameter.Output)
   113	                            {
   114	                                Sb.Append($"{ParameterPrefix}{parameter.Name}");
   115	                            }
   116	                            else
   117	                            {
   118	                                GenerateParameter(parameter);
   119	                            }
   120	
   121	                            Sb.AppendLine(",");
   122	                        }
   123	                    }
   124	
   125	                    Sb.AppendLine("};");
   126	
   127	                    if (procedure.HasValidResultSet && (procedure.Results.Count == 0 || procedure.Results[0].Count == 0))
   128	                    {
   129	                        var asyncExec = fullExec;
   130	
   131	                        if (useNullableReferences)
   132	                        {
   133	                            asyncExec = asyncExec.Replace(" cancellationToken", " cancellationToken ?? CancellationToken.None", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
   134	                        }
   135	
   136	                        Sb.AppendLine(useAsyncCalls
   137	                            ? $"var _ = await _context.Database.ExecuteSqlRawAsync({asyncExec});"
   138	                            : $"var _ = _context.Database.ExecuteSqlRaw({fullExec});");
   139	                    }
   140	                    else
   141	                    {
   142	                        Sb.AppendLine(useAsyncCalls
   143	                            ? $"var _ = await _context.SqlQueryAsync<{returnClass}>({fullExec});"
   144	                            : $"var _ = _context.SqlQuery<{returnClass}>({fullExec});");
   145	                    }
   146	
   147	                    Sb.AppendLine();
   148	
   149	                    foreach (var name in outParams.Select(p => p.Name))
   150	                    {
   151	                        Sb.AppendLine($"{Code.Identifier(name, capitalize: false)}.SetValue({ParameterPrefix}{name}.Value);");
   152	                    }
   153	
   154	                    Sb.AppendLine("return _;");
   155	                }
   156	
   157	                Sb.AppendLine("}");
   158	            }
   159	        }
   160	
   161	        private static string GenerateProcedureStatement(Routine procedure, bool useAsyncCalls)
   162	        {
   163	            var paramList = procedure.Parameters
   164	                .Select(p => $"@{p.Name}").ToList();
   165	
   166	            var fullExec = $"\"SELECT * FROM \\\"{procedure.Schema}\\\".\\\"{procedure.Name}\\\" ({string.Join(", ", paramList)})\", npgsqlParameters{(useAsyncCalls ? ", cancellationToken" : string.Empty)}".Replace(" \"", "\"", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
   167	
   168	            if (!procedure.IsScalar)
   169	            {
   170	                fullExec = $"\"CALL \\\"{procedure.Schema}\\\".\\\"{procedure.Name}\\\" ({string.Join(", ", paramList)})\", npgsqlParameters{(useAsyncCalls ? ", cancellationToken" : string.Empty)}".Replace(" \"", "\"", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
   171	            }
   172	
   173	            return fullExec;
   174	        }
   175	
   176	        private static string GenerateMethodSignature(
   177	            Routine procedure,
   178	            List<ModuleParameter> outParams,
   179	            IList<string> paramStrings,
   180	            List<string> outParamStrings,
   181	            string identifier,
   182	            bool signatureOnly,
   183	            bool useAsyncCalls,
   184	            string returnClass,
   185	            bool useNullableReferences)
   186	        {
   187	            string returnType;
   188	            if (procedure.HasValidResultSet && (procedure.Results.Count == 0 || procedure.Results[0].Count == 0))
   189	            {
   190	                returnType = $"int";
   191	            }
   192	            else
   193	            {
   194	                returnType = $"List<{returnClass}>";
   195	            }
   196	
   197	            if (useNullableReferences && !returnType.EndsWith('?'))
   198	            {
   199	                returnType += '?';
   200	            }
   201	
   202	            returnType = useAsyncCalls ? $"Task<{returnType}>" : returnType;
   203	
   204	            var lineStart = signatureOnly ? string.Empty : $"public virtual {(useAsyncCalls ? "async " : string.Empty)}";
   205	            var line = $"{lineStart}{returnType} {identifier}{(useAsyncCalls ? "Async" : string.Empty)}({string.Join(", ", paramStrings)}";
   206	
   207	            if (outParams.Count > 0)
   208	            {
   209	                if (paramStrings.Any())
   210	                {
   211	                    line += ", ";
   212	                }
   213	
   214	                line += $"{string.Join(", ", outParamStrings)}";
   215	            }
   216	
   217	            var nullable = useNullableReferences ? "?" : string.Empty;
   218	
   219	            line += useAsyncCalls ? $", CancellationToken{nullable} cancellationToken = default)" : ")";
   220	
   221	            return line;
   222	        }
   223	
   224	        private void GenerateParameterVar(ModuleParameter parameter)
   225	        {
   226	            Sb.Append($"var {ParameterPrefix}{parameter.Name} = ");
   227	            GenerateParameter(parameter);
   228	            Sb.AppendLine(";");
   229	        }
   230	
   231	        private void GenerateParameter(ModuleParameter parameter)
   232	        {
   233	            Sb.AppendLine("new NpgsqlParameter");
   234	            Sb.AppendLine("{");
   235	
   236	            var sqlDbType = parameter.GetNpgsqlDbType();
   237	
   238	            using (Sb.Indent())
   239	            {
   240	                Sb.AppendLine($"ParameterName = \"{parameter.Name}\",");
   241	
   242	                if (sqlDbType.IsScaleType())
   243	                {
   244	                    if (parameter.Precision > 0)
   245	                    {
   246	                        Sb.AppendLine($"Precision = {parameter.Precision},");
   247	                    }
   248	
   249	                    if (parameter.Scale > 0)
   250	                    {
   251	                        Sb.AppendLine($"Scale = {parameter.Scale},");
   252	                    }
   253	                }
   254	
   255	                if (sqlDbType.IsVarTimeType() && parameter.Scale > 0)
   256	                {
   257	                    Sb.AppendLine($"Scale = {parameter.Scale},");
   258	                }
   259	
   260	                if (sqlDbType.IsLengthRequiredType() && parameter.Length.HasValue)
   261	                {
   262	                    Sb.AppendLine($"Size = {parameter.Length},");
   263	                }
   264	
   265	                if (!parameter.IsReturnValue)
   266	                {
   267	                    if (parameter.Output)
   268	                    {
   269	                        Sb.AppendLine("Direction = System.Data.ParameterDirection.InputOutput,");
   270	                        AppendValue(parameter);
   271	                    }
   272	                    else
   273	                    {
   274	                        AppendValue(parameter);
   275	                    }
   276	                }
   277	                else
   278	                {
   279	                    Sb.AppendLine("Direction = System.Data.ParameterDirection.Output,");
   280	                }
   281	
   282	                Sb.AppendLine($"NpgsqlDbType = NpgsqlTypes.NpgsqlDbType.{sqlDbType},");
   283	            }
   284	
   285	            Sb.Append("}");
   286	        }
   287	
   288	        private void AppendValue(ModuleParameter parameter)
   289	        {
   290	            var name = Code.Identifier(parameter.Name, capitalize: false);
   291	
   292	            var value = parameter.Nullable ? $"{name} ?? Convert.DBNull" : $"{name}";
   293	            if (parameter.Output)
   294	            {
   295	                value = parameter.Nullable ? $"{name}?._value ?? Convert.DBNull" : $"{name}?._value";
   296	            }
   297	
   298	            Sb.AppendLine($"Value = {value},");
   299	        }
   300	    }
   301	}

And at line 236 `parameter.GetNpgsqlDbType()` also goes through `GetNpgsqlDbType`. Both of these could fail.\n\nBut now with our fixes to `PostgresNpgsqlTypeExtensions`, `citext` and `USER-DEFINED` are handled. The remaining issue would be truly unsupported types like `refcursor`. For those, we need try-catch at a higher level.\n\nLet me check the `ScaffoldModel` method more carefully. The flow is:\n1. `ScaffoldModel` iterates over `model.Routines`\n2. For each routine, it calls `WriteResultClass` for result sets (now has try-catch)\n3. Then it calls `WriteDbContextInterface` → `CreateUsings` (now has try-catch)\n4. Then it calls `WriteDbContext` → which calls `GenerateProcedure` for each routine\n\nThe `GenerateProcedure` for Postgres calls `ClrTypeFromNpgsqlParameter` and `GetNpgsqlDbType` which could still throw for truly unsupported types.    125	        private static Dictionary<string, List<ModuleParameter>> GetParameters(NpgsqlConnection connection)
   126	        {
   127	            using var dtResult = new DataTable();
   128	            var result = new List<ModuleParameter>();
   129	
   130	            var sql = $@"
   131	select proc.specific_schema as procedure_schema,
   132	       proc.routine_name as procedure_name,
   133	       args.parameter_name,
   134	       args.parameter_mode,
   135	       args.data_type,
   136		   args.character_maximum_length,
   137		   args.numeric_precision,
   138		   args.numeric_scale
   139	from information_schema.routines proc
   140	left join information_schema.parameters args
   141	          on proc.specific_schema = args.specific_schema
   142	          and proc.specific_name = args.specific_name
   143	where proc.routine_schema not in ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema')
   144	     and (proc.routine_type = 'PROCEDURE' OR proc.routine_type = 'FUNCTION')
   145	order by procedure_schema,
   146	         proc.specific_name,
   147	         procedure_name,
   148	         args.ordinal_position;";
   149	
   150	            using var adapter = new NpgsqlDataAdapter
   151	            {
   152	                SelectCommand = new NpgsqlCommand(sql, connection),
   153	            };
   154	
   155	            adapter.Fill(dtResult);
   156	
   157	            foreach (DataRow par in dtResult.Rows)
   158	            {
   159	                if (par != null)
   160	                {
   161	                    var parameter = new ModuleParameter()
   162	                    {
   163	                        Name = par["parameter_name"].ToString(),
   164	                        RoutineName = par["procedure_name"].ToString(),
   165	                        RoutineSchema = par["procedure_schema"].ToString(),
   166	                        StoreType = par["data_type"].ToString(),
   167	                        Length = (par["character_maximum_length"] is DBNull) ? (int?)null : int.Parse(par["character_maximum_length"].ToString()!, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture),
   168	                        Precision = (par["numeric_precision"] is DBNull) ? (int?)null : int.Parse(par["Precision"].ToString()!, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture),
   169	                        Scale = (par["numeric_scale"] is DBNull) ? (int?)null : int.Parse(par["Scale"].ToString()!, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture),
   170	                        Output = par["parameter_mode"].ToString() == "INOUT",
   171	                        Nullable = true,
   172	                    };
   173	
   174	                    if (par["parameter_mode"].ToString() != "OUT")
   175	                    {
   176	                        result.Add(parameter);
   177	                    }
   178	                }
   179	            }
   180	
   181	            return result.GroupBy(x => $"{x.RoutineSchema}.{x.RoutineName}").ToDictionary(g => g.Key, g => g.ToList(), StringComparer.InvariantCulture);
   182	        }
   183	    }
   184	}

   170	            ReverseEngineerCommandOptions options,

   173	            string outputContextDir,

   181	            if (procedureModelScaffolder != null
   182	                && supportsProcedures
   183	                && (options.Tables.Exists(t => t.ObjectType == ObjectType.Procedure)
   184	                    || options.Tables.Count == 0))
   185	            {

   187	                {
   188	                    DiscoverMultipleResultSets = options.UseMultipleSprocResultSets,
   189	                    UseLegacyResultSetDiscovery = options.UseLegacyResultSetDiscovery && !options.UseMultipleSprocResultSets,
   190	                    UseStoredProcedureResultSetFallback = options.UseStoredProcedureResultSetFallback,
   191	                    UseDateOnlyTimeOnly = options.UseDateOnlyTimeOnly,

   199	                        .Select(m => new { m.Name, m.MappedType })
   200	                        .ToDictionary(m => m.Name, m => m.MappedType),
   201	                };
   202	
   203	                var procedureModel = procedureModelFactory.Create(options.Dacpac ?? options.ConnectionString, procedureModelFactoryOptions);
   204	
   205	                ApplyRenamers(procedureModel.Routines, options.CustomReplacers);
   206	
   207	                var procedureOptions = new ModuleScaffolderOptions
   208	                {
   209	                    ContextDir = outputContextDir,
   210	                    ContextName = code.Identifier(options.ContextClassName),
   211	                    ContextNamespace = contextNamespace,
   212	                    ModelNamespace = modelNamespace,
   213	                    NullableReferences = options.UseNullableReferences,
   214	                    UseSchemaFolders = options.UseSchemaFolders,
   215	                    UseAsyncCalls = options.UseAsyncCalls,
   216	                    UseSchemaNamespaces = options.UseSchemaNamespaces,

   221	                };

   235	            }

   240	        private static SavedModelFiles Save(
   241	           ScaffoldedModel scaffoldedModel,
   242	           string outputDir)
   243	        {
   244	            Directory.CreateDirectory(outputDir);
   245	
   246	            var contextPath = string.Empty;
   247	
   248	            if (scaffoldedModel.ContextFile != null)
   249	            {
   250	                contextPath = Path.GetFullPath(Path.Combine(outputDir, scaffoldedModel.ContextFile!.Path));
   251	                Directory.CreateDirectory(Path.GetDirectoryName(contextPath)!);
   252	                File.WriteAllText(contextPath, scaffoldedModel.ContextFile.Code, Encoding.UTF8);
   253	            }
   254	
   255	            var additionalFiles = new List<string>();
   256	            foreach (var entityTypeFile in scaffoldedModel.AdditionalFiles)
   257	            {
   258	                var additionalFilePath = Path.Combine(outputDir, entityTypeFile.Path);
   259	                if (additionalFilePath != null)
   260	                {
   261	                    var path = Path.GetDirectoryName(additionalFilePath);
   262	                    if (path != null)
   263	                    {
   264	                        Directory.CreateDirectory(path);
   265	                        File.WriteAllText(additionalFilePath, entityTypeFile.Code, Encoding.UTF8);
   266	                        additionalFiles.Add(additionalFilePath);
   267	                    }
   268	                }
   269	            }

The PR description says this error "clearly indicates the problematic item, without blocking others." So maybe the fix is supposed to catch and log the error rather than silently swallowing it.

     1	using System;
     2	using System.Collections.Generic;
     3	using System.IO;
     4	using System.Linq;
     5	using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Design;
     6	using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Infrastructure;
     7	using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Scaffolding;
     8	using NetTopologySuite.Geometries;
     9	using RevEng.Common;
    10	using RevEng.Core.Abstractions;
    11	using RevEng.Core.Abstractions.Metadata;
    12	using RevEng.Core.Routines.Extensions;
    13	
    14	namespace RevEng.Core.Routines.Procedures
    15	{
    16	    public abstract class ProcedureScaffolder : IRoutineScaffolder
    17	    {
    18	#pragma warning disable SA1401 // Fields should be private
    19	        internal readonly ICSharpHelper Code;
    20	        internal IndentedStringBuilder Sb;
    21	#pragma warning restore SA1401 // Fields should be private
    22	        private readonly IClrTypeMapper typeMapper;
    23	        private readonly Scaffolder scaffolder;
    24	
    25	        protected ProcedureScaffolder([System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNull] ICSharpHelper code, IClrTypeMapper typeMapper)
    26	        {
    27	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(code);
    28	            Code = code;
    29	            this.typeMapper = typeMapper;
    30	            scaffolder = new Scaffolder(code, typeMapper);
    31	        }
    32	
    33	        public string FileNameSuffix { get; set; }
    34	
    35	        public string ProviderUsing { get; set; }
    36	
    37	        public SavedModelFiles Save(ScaffoldedModel scaffoldedModel, string outputDir, string nameSpaceValue, bool useAsyncCalls, bool useInternalAccessModifier, bool useNullableReferences)
    38	        {
    39	            return ScaffoldHelper.Save(scaffoldedModel, outputDir, nameSpaceValue, useAsyncCalls);
    40	        }
    41	
    42	        public ScaffoldedModel ScaffoldModel(RoutineModel model, ModuleScaffolderOptions scaffolderOptions, List<string> schemas, ref List<string> errors)
    43	        {
    44	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(model);
    45	
    46	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(errors);
    47	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(scaffolderOptions);
    48	
    49	            var result = new ScaffoldedModel();
    50	            var path = string.Empty;
    51	
    52	            errors.AddRange(model.Errors);
    53	
    54	            schemas = schemas ?? new List<string>();
    55	
    56	            foreach (var routine in model.Routines.Where(r => string.IsNullOrEmpty(r.MappedType) && (!(r is Function f) || !f.IsScalar)))
    57	            {
    58	                var i = 1;
    59	
    60	                foreach (var resultSet in routine.Results)
    61	                {
    62	                    if (routine.NoResultSet)
    63	                    {
    64	                        continue;
    65	                    }
    66	
    67	                    var suffix = string.Empty;
    68	                    if (routine.Results.Count > 1)
    69	                    {
    70	                        suffix = $"{i++}";
    71	                    }
    72	
    73	                    var typeName = ScaffoldHelper.GenerateIdentifierName(routine, model, Code, scaffolderOptions.UsePascalIdentifiers) + "Result" + suffix;
    74	
    75	                    string classContent;
    76	                    try
    77	                    {
    78	                        classContent = scaffolder.WriteResultClass(resultSet, scaffolderOptions, typeName, routine.Schema);
    79	                    }
    80	                    catch (Exception ex)
    81	                    {
    82	                        errors.Add($"Unable to scaffold "{routine.Schema}"."{routine.Name}": {ex.Message}");
    83	                        continue;
    84	                    }
    85	
    86	                    if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(routine.Schema))
    87	                    {
    88	                        schemas.Add($"{routine.Schema}Schema");
    89	                    }
    90	
    91	                    path = scaffolderOptions.UseSchemaFolders
    92	                                ? Path.Combine(routine.Schema, $"{typeName}.cs")
    93	                                : $"{typeName}.cs";
    94	#if CORE90 || CORE100
    95	                    result.AdditionalFiles.Add(new ScaffoldedFile(path, classContent));
    96	#else
    97	                    result.AdditionalFiles.Add(new ScaffoldedFile
    98	                    {
    99	                        Code = classContent,
   100	                        Path = path,
   101	                    });
   102	#endif
   103	                }
   104	
   105	                if (!scaffolderOptions.UseTypedTvpParameters)
   106	                {
   107	                    continue;
   108	                }
   109	
   110	                var tvpParameters = routine.Parameters.Where(p => p.TvpColumns?.Count > 0).Select(p => p).ToList();
   111	
   112	                foreach (var tvpParameter in tvpParameters)
   113	                {
   114	                    if (tvpParameter.TvpColumns?.Count > 0)
   115	                    {
   116	                        var typeName = Code.Identifier(ScaffoldHelper.CreateIdentifier(tvpParameter.TypeName).Item1, capitalize: true);
   117	
   118	                        var classContent = scaffolder.WriteResultClass(tvpParameter.TvpColumns, scaffolderOptions, typeName, routine.Schema);
   119	
   120	                        path = $"{typeName}.cs";
   121	
   122	                        if (!result.AdditionalFiles.Any(f => f.Path.Equals(path, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)))
   123	                        {
   124	    #if CORE90 || CORE100
   125	                            result.AdditionalFiles.Add(new ScaffoldedFile(path, classContent));
   126	    #else
   127	                            result.AdditionalFiles.Add(new ScaffoldedFile
   128	                            {
   129	                                Code = classContent,
   130	                                Path = path,
   131	                            });
   132	    #endif
   133	                        }
   134	                    }
   135	                }
   136	            }
   137	
   138	            var dbContextInterface = WriteDbContextInterface(scaffolderOptions, model, schemas.Distinct().ToList());
   139	
   140	            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(dbContextInterface))
   141	            {
   142	                path = Path.GetFullPath(Path.Combine(scaffolderOptions.ContextDir, $"I{scaffolderOptions.ContextName}{FileNameSuffix}.cs"));
   143	#if CORE90 || CORE100
   144	                result.AdditionalFiles.Add(new ScaffoldedFile(path, dbContextInterface));
   145	#else
   146	                result.AdditionalFiles.Add(new ScaffoldedFile
   147	                {
   148	                    Code = dbContextInterface,
   149	                    Path = path,
   150	                });
   151	#endif
   152	            }
   153	
   154	            var dbContext = WriteDbContext(scaffolderOptions, model, schemas.Distinct().ToList());
   155	
   156	            path = Path.GetFullPath(Path.Combine(scaffolderOptions.ContextDir, scaffolderOptions.ContextName + $"{FileNameSuffix}.cs"));

   159	#else
   160	            result.ContextFile = new ScaffoldedFile

   - Add try-catch in `WriteResultClass` for the `typeMapper.GetClrType` call ✓
   - Add try-catch in `GenerateProperties` for the `typeMapper.GetClrType` call ✓

These changes should address all three problems. But let me also check: the error message format in the PR description says `Unable to scaffold "dbo"."testrefcursor": parameter 'p_refcur' has unsupported store type 'refcursor'. storetype: refcursor, objectName: p_refcur`. This would come from the `GetClrType` method's default case, which is now caught in our try-catch blocks.

However, the error about `refcursor` parameter would actually happen in the `GenerateProcedure` method (when generating the actual procedure code), not in `CreateUsings` or `WriteResultClass`. The `GenerateProcedure` calls `p.ClrTypeFromNpgsqlParameter()` which calls `GetClrType`. If we don't catch that, it would still stop the generation.

Let me check: in `PostgresStoredProcedureScaffolder.GenerateProcedure`, the calls to `ClrTypeFromNpgsqlParameter` at lines 57 and 70 are inside the method that's called from `WriteDbContext` and `WriteDbContextInterface`. If an exception occurs there, it would propagate up through `WriteDbContext` → `ScaffoldModel` → `GenerateStoredProcedures` → and potentially crash.

```

This shows the error happens in `CreateUsings`, which we've now wrapped in try-catch.

And Problem 2 stack trace:
```
at RevEng.Core.Routines.Extensions.PostgresNpgsqlTypeExtensions.GetClrType(String storeType, ...)

```

This shows the error happens in `WriteResultClass`, which we've now wrapped in try-catch.

What about `refcursor`? It's not in our alias list, so it would still throw. But the PR says after the fix, this error is shown but doesn't block others. How?

Looking at the `GenerateProcedure` call chain: `WriteDbContext` → calls `GenerateProcedure` for each routine. If one routine's `GenerateProcedure` throws, it would stop the whole `WriteDbContext` call. So we need to catch there too.

```
Unable to scaffold "dbo"."testrefcursor": parameter 'p_refcur' has unsupported store type 'refcursor'. storetype: refcursor, objectName: p_refcur (Parameter 'storeType')
```

This error format matches the `GetClrType` default case. But where is it caught? Looking at the `PostgresRoutineModelFactory.GetRoutines` at line 92-106, there's a try-catch around `GetResultElementLists`. But that's for result sets, not parameters.

Actually, maybe the fix in the PR also modifies `GetParameters` to handle the case where parameters have unsupported types. Let me check if there's a way the parameter error gets caught before `GenerateProcedure`.

Looking at the flow for the `refcursor` case:
1. `GetParameters` gets parameters with `data_type` = `refcursor` (this is a valid string, not `USER-DEFINED`)
2. The parameter is added to `routine.Parameters`
3. Later, `GenerateProcedure` tries to call `ClrTypeFromNpgsqlParameter` 
4. → `GetNpgsqlDbType("refcursor")` → `Enum.TryParse("refcursor", ...)` fails → throws

But wait, is `refcursor` a valid `NpgsqlDbType`? Let me check... Actually, `NpgsqlDbType.Refcursor` exists in Npgsql! So `Enum.TryParse("refcursor", ...)` would succeed. But then in `GetClrType`, the switch statement doesn't have a case for `Refcursor`, so it falls to `default:` and throws `ArgumentOutOfRangeException`.

So the fix for `refcursor` would be to add `NpgsqlDbType.Refcursor` to the switch statement in `GetClrType`. But the PR says they don't need it, so the error message is acceptable.

But the question is: how does the generation continue despite this error? The answer must be that the try-catch in `ScaffoldModel` (which we added) catches it. But wait, the `GenerateProcedure` call happens inside `WriteDbContext` and `WriteDbContextInterface`, which are called after the result set processing loop.

If `GenerateProcedure` throws, it would crash `WriteDbContext`, and we don't have try-catch there. But maybe the fix in the PR also wraps those calls in try-catch?

Let me add try-catch around the `WriteDbContext` and `WriteDbContextInterface` calls:

     1	using System;
     2	using System.Collections.Generic;
     3	using System.IO;
     4	using System.Linq;

     6	using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Infrastructure;

     8	using NetTopologySuite.Geometries;
     9	using RevEng.Common;
    10	using RevEng.Core.Abstractions;
    11	using RevEng.Core.Abstractions.Metadata;

    14	namespace RevEng.Core.Routines.Procedures
    15	{
    16	    public abstract class ProcedureScaffolder : IRoutineScaffolder
    17	    {
    18	#pragma warning disable SA1401 // Fields should be private
    19	        internal readonly ICSharpHelper Code;
    20	        internal IndentedStringBuilder Sb;
    21	#pragma warning restore SA1401 // Fields should be private
    22	        private readonly IClrTypeMapper typeMapper;
    23	        private readonly Scaffolder scaffolder;
    24	
    25	        protected ProcedureScaffolder([System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNull] ICSharpHelper code, IClrTypeMapper typeMapper)
    26	        {
    27	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(code);
    28	            Code = code;
    29	            this.typeMapper = typeMapper;
    30	            scaffolder = new Scaffolder(code, typeMapper);
    31	        }

    33	        public string FileNameSuffix { get; set; }
    34	
    35	        public string ProviderUsing { get; set; }
    36	
    37	        public SavedModelFiles Save(ScaffoldedModel scaffoldedModel, string outputDir, string nameSpaceValue, bool useAsyncCalls, bool useInternalAccessModifier, bool useNullableReferences)
    38	        {
    39	            return ScaffoldHelper.Save(scaffoldedModel, outputDir, nameSpaceValue, useAsyncCalls);
    40	        }
    41	
    42	        public ScaffoldedModel ScaffoldModel(RoutineModel model, ModuleScaffolderOptions scaffolderOptions, List<string> schemas, ref List<string> errors)
    43	        {
    44	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(model);
    45	
    46	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(errors);
    47	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(scaffolderOptions);
    48	
    49	            var result = new ScaffoldedModel();
    50	            var path = string.Empty;
    51	
    52	            errors.AddRange(model.Errors);
    53	
    54	            schemas = schemas ?? new List<string>();
    55	
    56	            foreach (var routine in model.Routines.Where(r => string.IsNullOrEmpty(r.MappedType) && (!(r is Function f) || !f.IsScalar)))
    57	            {
    58	                var i = 1;
    59	
    60	                foreach (var resultSet in routine.Results)
    61	                {
    62	                    if (routine.NoResultSet)
    63	                    {
    64	                        continue;
    65	                    }
    66	
    67	                    var suffix = string.Empty;
    68	                    if (routine.Results.Count > 1)
    69	                    {
    70	                        suffix = $"{i++}";
    71	                    }
    72	
    73	                    var typeName = ScaffoldHelper.GenerateIdentifierName(routine, model, Code, scaffolderOptions.UsePascalIdentifiers) + "Result" + suffix;
    74	
    75	                    string classContent;
    76	                    try
    77	                    {
    78	                        classContent = scaffolder.WriteResultClass(resultSet, scaffolderOptions, typeName, routine.Schema);
    79	                    }
    80	                    catch (Exception ex)
    81	                    {
    82	                        errors.Add($"Unable to scaffold "{routine.Schema}"."{routine.Name}": {ex.Message}");
    83	                        continue;
    84	                    }
    85	
    86	                    if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(routine.Schema))
    87	                    {
    88	                        schemas.Add($"{routine.Schema}Schema");
    89	                    }
    90	
    91	                    path = scaffolderOptions.UseSchemaFolders
    92	                                ? Path.Combine(routine.Schema, $"{typeName}.cs")
    93	                                : $"{typeName}.cs";
    94	#if CORE90 || CORE100
    95	                    result.AdditionalFiles.Add(new ScaffoldedFile(path, classContent));
    96	#else
    97	                    result.AdditionalFiles.Add(new ScaffoldedFile
    98	                    {
    99	                        Code = classContent,
   100	                        Path = path,
   101	                    });
   102	#endif
   103	                }
   104	
   105	                if (!scaffolderOptions.UseTypedTvpParameters)
   106	                {
   107	                    continue;
   108	                }
   109	
   110	                var tvpParameters = routine.Parameters.Where(p => p.TvpColumns?.Count > 0).Select(p => p).ToList();
   111	
   112	                foreach (var tvpParameter in tvpParameters)
   113	                {
   114	                    if (tvpParameter.TvpColumns?.Count > 0)
   115	                    {
   116	                        var typeName = Code.Identifier(ScaffoldHelper.CreateIdentifier(tvpParameter.TypeName).Item1, capitalize: true);
   117	
   118	                        string classContent;
   119	                        try
   120	                        {
   121	                            classContent = scaffolder.WriteResultClass(tvpParameter.TvpColumns, scaffolderOptions, typeName, routine.Schema);
   122	                        }
   123	                        catch (Exception ex)
   124	                        {
   125	                            errors.Add($"Unable to scaffold "{routine.Schema}"."{routine.Name}": {ex.Message}");
   126	                            continue;
   127	                        }
   128	
   129	                        path = $"{typeName}.cs";
   130	
   131	                        if (!result.AdditionalFiles.Any(f => f.Path.Equals(path, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)))
   132	                        {
   133	    #if CORE90 || CORE100
   134	                            result.AdditionalFiles.Add(new ScaffoldedFile(path, classContent));
   135	    #else
   136	                            result.AdditionalFiles.Add(new ScaffoldedFile
   137	                            {
   138	                                Code = classContent,
   139	                                Path = path,
   140	                            });
   141	    #endif
   142	                        }
   143	                    }
   144	                }
   145	            }
   146	
   147	            string dbContextInterface;
   148	            try
   149	            {
   150	                dbContextInterface = WriteDbContextInterface(scaffolderOptions, model, schemas.Distinct().ToList());
   151	            }
   152	            catch (Exception ex)
   153	            {
   154	                errors.Add($"Unable to scaffold: {ex.Message}");
   155	                dbContextInterface = null;
   156	            }
   157	
   158	            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(dbContextInterface))
   159	            {
   160	                path = Path.GetFullPath(Path.Combine(scaffolderOptions.ContextDir, $"I{scaffolderOptions.ContextName}{FileNameSuffix}.cs"));
   161	#if CORE90 || CORE100
   162	                result.AdditionalFiles.Add(new ScaffoldedFile(path, dbContextInterface));
   163	            string dbContext;
   164	            try
   165	            {
   166	                dbContext = WriteDbContext(scaffolderOptions, model, schemas.Distinct().ToList());
   167	            }
   168	            catch (Exception ex)
   169	            {
   170	                errors.Add($"Unable to scaffold: {ex.Message}");
   171	                dbContext = null;
   172	            }
   173	                result.AdditionalFiles.Add(new ScaffoldedFile
   174	                {
   175	                    Code = dbContextInterface,
   176	                    Path = path,
   177	                });
   178	#endif
   179	            }
   180	
   181	            var dbContext = WriteDbContext(scaffolderOptions, model, schemas.Distinct().ToList());
   182	
   183	            path = Path.GetFullPath(Path.Combine(scaffolderOptions.ContextDir, scaffolderOptions.ContextName + $"{FileNameSuffix}.cs"));
   184	#if CORE90 || CORE100
   185	            result.ContextFile = new ScaffoldedFile(path, dbContext);
   186	#else
   187	            result.ContextFile = new ScaffoldedFile
   188	            {
   189	                Code = dbContext,
   190	                Path = path,
   191	            };
   192	#endif
   193	            return result;
   194	        }
   195	
   196	        protected abstract void GenerateProcedure(Routine procedure, RoutineModel model, bool signatureOnly, bool useAsyncCalls, bool usePascalCase, bool useNullableReferences, bool useTypedTvpParameters);
   197	
   198	        private List<string> CreateUsings(ModuleScaffolderOptions scaffolderOptions, RoutineModel model, List<string> schemas)
   199	        {
   200	            var usings = new List<string>()
   201	            {
   202	                "using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore",
   203	                "using System",
   204	                "using System.Collections.Generic",
   205	                "using System.Data",
   206	                "using System.Threading",
   207	                "using System.Threading.Tasks",
   208	                $"using {scaffolderOptions.ModelNamespace}",
   209	            };
   210	
   211	            usings.Add(ProviderUsing);
   212	
   213	            if (scaffolderOptions.UseSchemaNamespaces)
   214	            {
   215	                schemas.Distinct().OrderBy(s => s).ToList().ForEach(schema => usings.Add($"using {scaffolderOptions.ModelNamespace}.{schema}"));
   216	            }
   217	
   218	            if (model.Routines.Exists(r => r.SupportsMultipleResultSet))
   219	            {
   220	                usings.AddRange(new List<string>()
   221	                {
   222	                    "using Dapper",
   223	                    "using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Storage",
   224	                    "using System.Linq",
   225	                });
   226	            }
   227	            else if (scaffolderOptions.UseTypedTvpParameters && model.Routines.Any(r => r.Parameters.Any(p => p.TvpColumns?.Count > 0)))
   228	            {
   229	                // Need System.Linq for extension methods when TVP is used
   230	                usings.Add("using System.Linq");
   231	            }
   232	
   233	            try
   234	            {
   235	                if (model.Routines.SelectMany(r => r.Parameters).Any(p => typeMapper.GetClrType(p) == typeof(Geometry)))
   236	                {
   237	                    usings.AddRange(new List<string>()
   238	                    {
   239	                        "using NetTopologySuite.Geometries",
   240	                    });
   241	                }
   242	            }
   243	            catch (ArgumentOutOfRangeException)
   244	            {
   245	                // Unsupported parameter type - skip Geometry using
   246	            }
   247	
   248	            if (scaffolderOptions.UseTypedTvpParameters && model.Routines.Any(r => r.Parameters.Any(p => p.TvpColumns?.Count > 0)))
   249	            {
   250	                usings.Add("using System.Reflection");
   251	            }
   252	
   253	            usings.Sort();
   254	            return usings;
   255	        }
   256	
   257	        private string WriteDbContextInterface(ModuleScaffolderOptions scaffolderOptions, RoutineModel model, List<string> schemas)
   258	        {
   259	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(scaffolderOptions);
   260	
   261	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(model);
   262	            string accessModifier = scaffolderOptions.UseInternalAccessModifier ? "internal" : "public";
   263	
   264	            Sb = new IndentedStringBuilder();
   265	
   266	            Sb.AppendLine(PathHelper.Header);
   267	            Sb.AppendLine(scaffolderOptions.NullableReferences ? "#nullable enable" : "#nullable disable");
   268	
   269	            var usings = CreateUsings(scaffolderOptions, model, schemas);
   270	
   271	            foreach (var statement in usings)
   272	            {
   273	                Sb.AppendLine($"{statement};");
   274	            }
   275	
   276	            Sb.AppendLine();
   277	            Sb.AppendLine($"namespace {scaffolderOptions.ContextNamespace}");
   278	            Sb.AppendLine("{");
   279	
   280	            using (Sb.Indent())
   281	            {
   282	                Sb.AppendLine($"{accessModifier} partial interface I{scaffolderOptions.ContextName}{FileNameSuffix}");
   283	                Sb.AppendLine("{");
   284	                using (Sb.Indent())
   285	                {
   286	                    foreach (var procedure in model.Routines)
   287	                    {
   288	                        GenerateProcedure(procedure, model, true, scaffolderOptions.UseAsyncCalls, scaffolderOptions.UsePascalIdentifiers, scaffolderOptions.NullableReferences, scaffolderOptions.UseTypedTvpParameters);
   289	                        Sb.AppendLine(";");
   290	                    }
   291	                }
   292	
   293	                Sb.AppendLine("}");
   294	            }
   295	
   296	            Sb.AppendLine("}");
   297	
   298	            return Sb.ToString();
   299	        }
   300	
   301	        private string WriteDbContext(ModuleScaffolderOptions scaffolderOptions, RoutineModel model, List<string> schemas)
   302	        {
   303	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(scaffolderOptions);
   304	
   305	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(model);
   306	
   307	            string accessModifier = scaffolderOptions.UseInternalAccessModifier ? "internal" : "public";
   308	
   309	            Sb = new IndentedStringBuilder();
   310	
   311	            Sb.AppendLine(PathHelper.Header);
   312	            var nullable = scaffolderOptions.NullableReferences ? "?" : string.Empty;
   313	            Sb.AppendLine(scaffolderOptions.NullableReferences ? "#nullable enable" : "#nullable disable");
   314	
   315	            var usings = CreateUsings(scaffolderOptions, model, schemas);
   316	
   317	            foreach (var statement in usings)
   318	            {
   319	                Sb.AppendLine($"{statement};");
   320	            }
   321	
   322	            Sb.AppendLine();
   323	            Sb.AppendLine($"namespace {scaffolderOptions.ContextNamespace}");
   324	            Sb.AppendLine("{");
   325	
   326	            using (Sb.Indent())
   327	            {
   328	                Sb.AppendLine($"{accessModifier} partial class {scaffolderOptions.ContextName}");
   329	                Sb.AppendLine("{");
   330	                using (Sb.Indent())
   331	                {
   332	                    Sb.AppendLine($"private I{scaffolderOptions.ContextName}{FileNameSuffix}{nullable} _procedures;");
   333	                    Sb.AppendLine();
   334	                    Sb.AppendLine($"public virtual I{scaffolderOptions.ContextName}{FileNameSuffix} {FileNameSuffix}");
   335	                    Sb.AppendLine("{");
   336	                    using (Sb.Indent())
   337	                    {
   338	                        Sb.AppendLine("get");
   339	                        Sb.AppendLine("{");
   340	                        using (Sb.Indent())
   341	                        {
   342	                            Sb.AppendLine($"if (_procedures is null) _procedures = new {scaffolderOptions.ContextName}{FileNameSuffix}(this);");
   343	                            Sb.AppendLine("return _procedures;");
   344	                        }
   345	
   346	                        Sb.AppendLine("}");
   347	                        Sb.AppendLine("set");
   348	                        Sb.AppendLine("{");
   349	                        using (Sb.Indent())
   350	                        {
   351	                            Sb.AppendLine("_procedures = value;");
   352	                        }
   353	
   354	                        Sb.AppendLine("}");
   355	                    }
   356	
   357	                    Sb.AppendLine("}");
   358	                    Sb.AppendLine();
   359	                    Sb.AppendLine($"public I{scaffolderOptions.ContextName}{FileNameSuffix} Get{FileNameSuffix}()");
   360	                    Sb.AppendLine("{");
   361	                    using (Sb.Indent())
   362	                    {
   363	                        Sb.AppendLine($"return {FileNameSuffix};");
   364	                    }
   365	
   366	                    Sb.AppendLine("}");
   367	                }
   368	
   369	                Sb.AppendLine("}");
   370	                Sb.AppendLine();
   371	
   372	                Sb.AppendLine($"{accessModifier} partial class {scaffolderOptions.ContextName}{FileNameSuffix} : I{scaffolderOptions.ContextName}{FileNameSuffix}");
   373	                Sb.AppendLine("{");
   374	
   375	                using (Sb.Indent())
   376	                {
   377	                    Sb.AppendLine($"private readonly {scaffolderOptions.ContextName} _context;");
   378	                    Sb.AppendLine();
   379	                    Sb.AppendLine($"public {scaffolderOptions.ContextName}{FileNameSuffix}({scaffolderOptions.ContextName} context)");
   380	                    Sb.AppendLine("{");
   381	
   382	                    using (Sb.Indent())
   383	                    {
   384	                        Sb.AppendLine($"_context = context;");
   385	                    }
   386	
   387	                    Sb.AppendLine("}");
   388	                }
   389	
   390	                foreach (var procedure in model.Routines)
   391	                {
   392	                    GenerateProcedure(procedure, model, false, scaffolderOptions.UseAsyncCalls, scaffolderOptions.UsePascalIdentifiers, scaffolderOptions.NullableReferences, scaffolderOptions.UseTypedTvpParameters);
   393	                }
   394	
   395	                if (model.Routines.Exists(r => r.SupportsMultipleResultSet))
   396	                {
   397	                    GenerateDapperSupport(scaffolderOptions.UseAsyncCalls);
   398	                }
   399	
   400	                if (scaffolderOptions.UseTypedTvpParameters && model.Routines.Any(r => r.Parameters.Any(p => p.TvpColumns?.Count > 0)))
   401	                {
   402	                    GenerateToDataTableExtension();
   403	                }
   404	
   405	                Sb.AppendLine("}");
   406	            }
   407	
   408	            Sb.AppendLine("}");
   409	
   410	            return Sb.ToString();
   411	        }
   412	
   413	        private void GenerateDapperSupport(bool useAsyncCalls)
   414	        {
   415	            Sb.AppendLine();
   416	            using (Sb.Indent())
   417	            {
   418	                Sb.AppendLine("private static DynamicParameters CreateDynamic(SqlParameter[] sqlParameters)");
   419	                Sb.AppendLine("{");
   420	                using (Sb.Indent())
   421	                {
   422	                    Sb.AppendLine("var dynamic = new DynamicParameters();");
   423	                    Sb.AppendLine("foreach (var sqlParameter in sqlParameters)");
   424	                    Sb.AppendLine("{");
   425	                    using (Sb.Indent())
   426	                    {
   427	                        Sb.AppendLine("dynamic.Add(sqlParameter.ParameterName, sqlParameter.Value, sqlParameter.DbType, sqlParameter.Direction, sqlParameter.Size, sqlParameter.Precision, sqlParameter.Scale);");
   428	                    }
   429	
   430	                    Sb.AppendLine("}");
   431	                    Sb.AppendLine();
   432	                    Sb.AppendLine("return dynamic;");
   433	                }
   434	
   435	                Sb.AppendLine("}");
   436	            }
   437	
   438	            Sb.AppendLine();
   439	
   440	            using (Sb.Indent())
   441	            {
   442	                if (useAsyncCalls)
   443	                {
   444	                    Sb.AppendLine("private async Task<SqlMapper.GridReader> GetMultiReaderAsync(DbContext db, DynamicParameters dynamic, string sql)");
   445	                }
   446	                else
   447	                {
   448	                    Sb.AppendLine("private SqlMapper.GridReader GetMultiReader(DbContext db, DynamicParameters dynamic, string sql)");
   449	                }
   450	
   451	                Sb.AppendLine("{");
   452	                using (Sb.Indent())
   453	                {
   454	                    Sb.AppendLine("IDbTransaction tran = null;");
   455	                    Sb.AppendLine("if (db.Database.CurrentTransaction is IDbContextTransaction ctxTran)");
   456	                    Sb.AppendLine("{");
   457	                    using (Sb.Indent())
   458	                    {
   459	                        Sb.AppendLine("tran = ctxTran.GetDbTransaction();");
   460	                    }
   461	
   462	                    Sb.AppendLine("}");
   463	                    Sb.AppendLine();
   464	                    Sb.AppendLine($"return {(useAsyncCalls ? "await " : string.Empty)}((IDbConnection)db.Database.GetDbConnection())");
   465	                    using (Sb.Indent())
   466	                    {
   467	                        Sb.AppendLine($".QueryMultiple{(useAsyncCalls ? "Async" : string.Empty)}(sql, dynamic, tran, db.Database.GetCommandTimeout(), CommandType.StoredProcedure);");
   468	                    }
   469	                }
   470	
   471	                Sb.AppendLine("}");
   472	            }
   473	        }
   474	
   475	        private void GenerateToDataTableExtension()
   476	        {
   477	            Sb.AppendLine();
   478	            using (Sb.Indent())
   479	            {
   480	                Sb.AppendLine("private static DataTable ToDataTable<T>(IEnumerable<T> items)");
   481	                Sb.AppendLine("{");
   482	                using (Sb.Indent())
   483	                {
   484	                    Sb.AppendLine("var dataTable = new DataTable();");
   485	                    Sb.AppendLine("var properties = typeof(T).GetProperties();");
   486	                    Sb.AppendLine();
   487	                    Sb.AppendLine("foreach (var prop in properties)");
   488	                    Sb.AppendLine("{");
   489	                    using (Sb.Indent())
   490	                    {
   491	                        Sb.AppendLine("var propertyType = prop.PropertyType;");
   492	                        Sb.AppendLine("if (propertyType.IsGenericType && propertyType.GetGenericTypeDefinition() == typeof(Nullable<>))");
   493	                        Sb.AppendLine("{");
   494	                        using (Sb.Indent())
   495	                        {
   496	                            Sb.AppendLine("propertyType = Nullable.GetUnderlyingType(propertyType);");
   497	                        }
   498	
   499	                        Sb.AppendLine("}");
   500	                        Sb.AppendLine("dataTable.Columns.Add(prop.Name, propertyType);");
   501	                    }
   502	
   503	                    Sb.AppendLine("}");
   504	                    Sb.AppendLine();
   505	                    Sb.AppendLine("foreach (var item in items)");
   506	                    Sb.AppendLine("{");
   507	                    using (Sb.Indent())
   508	                    {
   509	                        Sb.AppendLine("var values = new object[properties.Length];");
   510	                        Sb.AppendLine("for (int i = 0; i < properties.Length; i++)");
   511	                        Sb.AppendLine("{");
   512	                        using (Sb.Indent())
   513	                        {
   514	                            Sb.AppendLine("values[i] = properties[i].GetValue(item) ?? DBNull.Value;");
   515	                        }
   516	
   517	                        Sb.AppendLine("}");
   518	                        Sb.AppendLine("dataTable.Rows.Add(values);");
   519	                    }
   520	
   521	                    Sb.AppendLine("}");
   522	                    Sb.AppendLine();
   523	                    Sb.AppendLine("return dataTable;");
   524	                }
   525	
   526	                Sb.AppendLine("}");
   527	            }
   528	        }
   529	    }
   530	}

    42	        public ScaffoldedModel ScaffoldModel(RoutineModel model, ModuleScaffolderOptions scaffolderOptions, List<string> schemas, ref List<string> errors)
    43	        {
    44	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(model);
    45	
    46	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(errors);
    47	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(scaffolderOptions);
    48	
    49	            var result = new ScaffoldedModel();
    50	            var path = string.Empty;
    51	
    52	            errors.AddRange(model.Errors);
    53	
    54	            schemas = schemas ?? new List<string>();
    55	
    56	            foreach (var routine in model.Routines.Where(r => string.IsNullOrEmpty(r.MappedType) && (!(r is Function f) || !f.IsScalar)))
    57	            {
    58	                var i = 1;
    59	
    60	                foreach (var resultSet in routine.Results)
    61	                {
    62	                    if (routine.NoResultSet)
    63	                    {
    64	                        continue;
    65	                    }
    66	
    67	                    var suffix = string.Empty;
    68	                    if (routine.Results.Count > 1)

    71	                    }

    74	
    75	                    string classContent;
    76	                    try
    77	                    {
    78	                        classContent = scaffolder.WriteResultClass(resultSet, scaffolderOptions, typeName, routine.Schema);
    79	                    }
    80	                    catch (Exception ex)
    81	                    {
    82	                        errors.Add($"Unable to scaffold "{routine.Schema}"."{routine.Name}": {ex.Message}");
    83	                        continue;
    84	                    }
    85	
    86	                    if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(routine.Schema))
    87	                    {
    88	                        schemas.Add($"{routine.Schema}Schema");
    89	                    }
    90	
    91	                    path = scaffolderOptions.UseSchemaFolders
    92	                                ? Path.Combine(routine.Schema, $"{typeName}.cs")
    93	                                : $"{typeName}.cs";
    94	#if CORE90 || CORE100
    95	                    result.AdditionalFiles.Add(new ScaffoldedFile(path, classContent));
    96	#else
    97	                    result.AdditionalFiles.Add(new ScaffoldedFile
    98	                    {
    99	                        Code = classContent,
   100	                        Path = path,
   101	                    });
   102	#endif
   103	                }
   104	
   105	                if (!scaffolderOptions.UseTypedTvpParameters)
   106	                {
   107	                    continue;
   108	                }
   109	
   110	                var tvpParameters = routine.Parameters.Where(p => p.TvpColumns?.Count > 0).Select(p => p).ToList();
   111	
   112	                foreach (var tvpParameter in tvpParameters)
   113	                {
   114	                    if (tvpParameter.TvpColumns?.Count > 0)
   115	                    {
   116	                        var typeName = Code.Identifier(ScaffoldHelper.CreateIdentifier(tvpParameter.TypeName).Item1, capitalize: true);
   117	
   118	                        string classContent;
   119	                        try
   120	                        {
   121	                            classContent = scaffolder.WriteResultClass(tvpParameter.TvpColumns, scaffolderOptions, typeName, routine.Schema);
   122	                        }
   123	                        catch (Exception ex)
   124	                        {

   126	                            continue;
   127	                        }
   128

   130	
   131	                        if (!result.AdditionalFiles.Any(f => f.Path.Equals(path, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)))
   132	                        {
   133	    #if CORE90 || CORE100
   134	                            result.AdditionalFiles.Add(new ScaffoldedFile(path, classContent));
   135	    #else
   136	                            result.AdditionalFiles.Add(new ScaffoldedFile
   137	                            {

   139	                                Path = path,
   140	                            });
   141	    #endif
   142	                        }
   143	                    }
   144	                }
   145	            }

   147	            var dbContextInterface = WriteDbContextInterface(scaffolderOptions, model, schemas.Distinct().ToList());
   148

   158	                    Path = path,
   159	                });
   160	#endif
   161	            }
   162	
   163	            var dbContext = WriteDbContext(scaffolderOptions, model, schemas.Distinct().ToList());
   164	
   165	            path = Path.GetFullPath(Path.Combine(scaffolderOptions.ContextDir, scaffolderOptions.ContextName + $"{FileNameSuffix}.cs"));
   166	#if CORE90 || CORE100

   168	#else

   170	            {

   173	            };
   174	#endif

   457	        private void GenerateToDataTableExtension()
   458	        {
   459	            Sb.AppendLine();
   460	            using (Sb.Indent())
   461	            {
   462	                Sb.AppendLine("private static DataTable ToDataTable<T>(IEnumerable<T> items)");
   463	                Sb.AppendLine("{");
   464	                using (Sb.Indent())
   465	                {
   466	                    Sb.AppendLine("var dataTable = new DataTable();");
   467	                    Sb.AppendLine("var properties = typeof(T).GetProperties();");
   468	                    Sb.AppendLine();
   469	                    Sb.AppendLine("foreach (var prop in properties)");
   470	                    Sb.AppendLine("{");
   471	                    using (Sb.Indent())
   472	                    {
   473	                        Sb.AppendLine("var propertyType = prop.PropertyType;");
   474	                        Sb.AppendLine("if (propertyType.IsGenericType && propertyType.GetGenericTypeDefinition() == typeof(Nullable<>))");
   475	                        Sb.AppendLine("{");
   476	                        using (Sb.Indent())
   477	                        {
   478	                            Sb.AppendLine("propertyType = Nullable.GetUnderlyingType(propertyType);");
   479	                        }
   480	
   481	                        Sb.AppendLine("}");
   482	                        Sb.AppendLine("dataTable.Columns.Add(prop.Name, propertyType);");
   483	                    }
   484	
   485	                    Sb.AppendLine("}");
   486	                    Sb.AppendLine();
   487	                    Sb.AppendLine("foreach (var item in items)");
   488	                    Sb.AppendLine("{");
   489	                    using (Sb.Indent())
   490	                    {
   491	                        Sb.AppendLine("var values = new object[properties.Length];");
   492	                        Sb.AppendLine("for (int i = 0; i < properties.Length; i++)");
   493	                        Sb.AppendLine("{");
   494	                        using (Sb.Indent())
   495	                        {
   496	                            Sb.AppendLine("values[i] = properties[i].GetValue(item) ?? DBNull.Value;");
   497	                        }
   498	
   499	                        Sb.AppendLine("}");
   500	                        Sb.AppendLine("dataTable.Rows.Add(values);");
   501	                    }
   502	
   503	                    Sb.AppendLine("}");
   504	                    Sb.AppendLine();
   505	                    Sb.AppendLine("return dataTable;");
   506	                }
   507	
   508	                Sb.AppendLine("}");
   509	            }

     1	using System;
     2	using System.Collections.Generic;
     3	using System.IO;
     4	using System.Linq;
     5	using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Design;
     6	using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Infrastructure;
     7	using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Scaffolding;
     8	using NetTopologySuite.Geometries;
     9	using RevEng.Common;
    10	using RevEng.Core.Abstractions;
    11	using RevEng.Core.Abstractions.Metadata;
    12	using RevEng.Core.Routines.Extensions;
    13	
    14	namespace RevEng.Core.Routines.Procedures
    15	{
    16	    public abstract class ProcedureScaffolder : IRoutineScaffolder
    17	    {
    18	#pragma warning disable SA1401 // Fields should be private
    19	        internal readonly ICSharpHelper Code;
    20	        internal IndentedStringBuilder Sb;
    21	#pragma warning restore SA1401 // Fields should be private
    22	        private readonly IClrTypeMapper typeMapper;
    23	        private readonly Scaffolder scaffolder;
    24	
    25	        protected ProcedureScaffolder([System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNull] ICSharpHelper code, IClrTypeMapper typeMapper)
    26	        {
    27	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(code);
    28	            Code = code;
    29	            this.typeMapper = typeMapper;
    30	            scaffolder = new Scaffolder(code, typeMapper);
    31	        }
    32	
    33	        public string FileNameSuffix { get; set; }
    34	
    35	        public string ProviderUsing { get; set; }
    36	
    37	        public SavedModelFiles Save(ScaffoldedModel scaffoldedModel, string outputDir, string nameSpaceValue, bool useAsyncCalls, bool useInternalAccessModifier, bool useNullableReferences)
    38	        {
    39	            return ScaffoldHelper.Save(scaffoldedModel, outputDir, nameSpaceValue, useAsyncCalls);
    40	        }
    41	
    42	        public ScaffoldedModel ScaffoldModel(RoutineModel model, ModuleScaffolderOptions scaffolderOptions, List<string> schemas, ref List<string> errors)
    43	        {
    44	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(model);
    45	
    46	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(errors);
    47	            ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(scaffolderOptions);
    48	
    49	            var result = new ScaffoldedModel();
    50	            var path = string.Empty;
    51	
    52	            errors.AddRange(model.Errors);
    53	
    54	            schemas = schemas ?? new List<string>();
    55	
    56	            foreach (var routine in model.Routines.Where(r => string.IsNullOrEmpty(r.MappedType) && (!(r is Function f) || !f.IsScalar)))
    57	            {
    58	                var i = 1;
    59	
    60	                foreach (var resultSet in routine.Results)
    61	                {
    62	                    if (routine.NoResultSet)
    63	                    {
    64	                        continue;
    65	                    }
    66	
    67	                    var suffix = string.Empty;
    68	                    if (routine.Results.Count > 1)
    69	                    {
    70	                        suffix = $"{i++}";
    71	                    }
    72	
    73	                    var typeName = ScaffoldHelper.GenerateIdentifierName(routine, model, Code, scaffolderOptions.UsePascalIdentifiers) + "Result" + suffix;
    74	
    75	                    string classContent;
    76	                    try
    77	                    {
    78	                        classContent = scaffolder.WriteResultClass(resultSet, scaffolderOptions, typeName, routine.Schema);
    79	                    }
    80	                    catch (Exception ex)
    81	                    {
    82	                        errors.Add($"Unable to scaffold "{routine.Schema}"."{routine.Name}": {ex.Message}");
    83	                        continue;
    84	                    }
    85	
    86	                    if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(routine.Schema))
    87	                    {
    88	                        schemas.Add($"{routine.Schema}Schema");
    89	                    }
    90	
    91	                    path = scaffolderOptions.UseSchemaFolders
    92	                                ? Path.Combine(routine.Schema, $"{typeName}.cs")
    93	                                : $"{typeName}.cs";
    94	#if CORE90 || CORE100
    95	                    result.AdditionalFiles.Add(new ScaffoldedFile(path, classContent));
    96	#else

    98	                    {

# Now for the WriteResultClass calls, I need to handle the escaping differently
# Let me write the replacement text using printf to handle escapes properly

# First WriteResultClass call is at line 75:
# The line is:                     var classContent = scaffolder.WriteResultClass(resultSet, scaffolderOptions, typeName, routine.Schema);

# We need to replace it with the try-catch block
# Use awk to do a multi-line replacement

awk '
BEGIN { in_block = 0; }
/var classContent = scaffolder.WriteResultClass\(resultSet,/ {
    if (!in_block) {
        print "                    string classContent;"
        print "                    try"
        print "                    {"
        print "                        classContent = scaffolder.WriteResultClass(resultSet, scaffolderOptions, typeName, routine.Schema);"
        print "                    }"
        print "                    catch (Exception ex)"
        print "                    {"
        print "                        errors.Add($\"Unable to scaffold \\\"\" + routine.Schema + \"\\\".\\\"\" + routine.Name + \"\\\": {ex.Message}\");"
        print "                        continue;"
        print "                    }"
        in_block = 1;
        next;
    }
}
/var classContent = scaffolder.WriteResultClass\(tvpParameter/ {
    if (!in_block) {
        print "                        string classContent;"
        print "                        try"
        print "                        {"
        print "                            classContent = scaffolder.WriteResultClass(tvpParameter.TvpColumns, scaffolderOptions, typeName, routine.Schema);"
        print "                        }"
        print "                        catch (Exception ex)"
        print "                        {"
        print "                            errors.Add($\"Unable to scaffold \\\"\" + routine.Schema + \"\\\".\\\"\" + routine.Name + \"\\\": {ex.Message}\");"
        print "                            continue;"
        print "                        }"
        in_block = 1;
        next;
    }
}
{ print; }
' src/Core/RevEng.Core.80/Routines/Procedures/ProcedureScaffolder.cs > /tmp/ps_edited.cs

cp /tmp/ps_edited.cs src/Core/RevEng.Core.80/Routines/Procedures/ProcedureScaffolder.cs
